_You won’t want to miss it!_

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.)

We’ll see you there!
⎼ The NDTC Team

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Message from Action 4 Liberty
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_re_in_trouble&n=1)
---
June 22, 2021
## We're in Trouble if These Budget Bills Pass
Peter, Senate Republicans are starting to pass budget bills with the Democrat House to fund Governor Walz' bloated government agencies. They're even making [deals to bail out Minneapolis](https://www.action4liberty.com/minneapolis_bailout_appears_to_be_part_of_deal_struck_by_gazelka?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_re_in_trouble&n=2) for damage caused by the 2020 riots. At this point, there's no assurance that Walz' Emergency Powers will end. This is a **HUGE Sell Out**. [Contact Paul Gazelka](mailto:sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn) immediately and tell him don't pass the budget unless Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated for good! His phone number is 651-296-4875. **** **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: FINAL CHANCE to stop HR1 before it becomes law
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
****
The situation is DIRE Peter.

The situation is DIRE Peter.

HR 1 already passed Nancy Pelosi's House of Representatives. Now Schumer is trying to push it through the Senate.

Let me be clear, the Senate is the ONLY thing standing between HR1 and Biden signing it into law.
_****_
[STOP HR 1](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=56ec0094798c4faf8a71384362da297f&_e=8nvqvAm8xoXQtMHQbnexXh8qDX_dTCWaWIeIlJfxaNv295Ym__xyYYhEwQ93P_SbKdAjR2u_Vx_BXbMEzUWqVed_YRjSjKcDkkoQF7YqIyL9BXSqtcYYKe6hUHhcBPInc1Vt_1tDjGCm015wuTFG3tDMEn0jA8WR1FQe-F0jXXvEHyWZ8jXsV73hNoRPJfLqcuGZEPMVdpPMUHPmZr7W18xtMlYWa5B9r1-vcwx9l26xGB0tOf7-U26fmPrMtUCsD0D7BWpnJGz9DBoA8Jhy76NWwmFkHm4KxOSCSoas0FrMryVQVvb5GWUfwTeP_BXvOzW25THqiKF0kuuLCagtbt9lik7J1Al8fXoT8U16Pj8QS08AKaH49wy7BAtITKKKfyP7XxNluQXTpSPOUDrH2k2LfcTmd6j15N0vx-g4MZo0TiXDh3xY4Faf4mfEeLLK_KMFq_qrBTjaYoya9P28guL0ZXJcm8ZIPVJaGxpXurvPm9YFPOOpIi31qedB1MIkRqF8KLr8Ahjiw-XyCyMfVP2CmleFRRow0ZdQob6vk8HIrcm3lCrMCRGE-NzAah3T)
---

If this passes, it will ABOLISH election integrity and give state election powers to the Federal government. Authoritarian regimes around the world give too much of their election power to the central government. I don't want our great US of A to be next.

**We need to show Schumer that the American people do not support this. I need OVERWHELMING SUPPORT before the vote. Can I count on you? **

[STOP HR 1](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=56ec0094798c4faf8a71384362da297f&_e=8nvqvAm8xoXQtMHQbnexXh8qDX_dTCWaWIeIlJfxaNv295Ym__xyYYhEwQ93P_SbKdAjR2u_Vx_BXbMEzUWqVed_YRjSjKcDkkoQF7YqIyL9BXSqtcYYKe6hUHhcBPInc1Vt_1tDjGCm015wuTFG3tDMEn0jA8WR1FQe-F0jXXvEHyWZ8jXsV73hNoRPJfLqcuGZEPMVdpPMUHPmZr7W18xtMlYWa5B9r1-vcwx9l26xGB0tOf7-U26fmPrMtUCsD0D7BWpnJGz9DBoA8Jhy76NWwmFkHm4KxOSCSoas0FrMryVQVvb5GWUfwTeP_BXvOzW25THqiKF0kuuLCagtbt9lik7J1Al8fXoT8U16Pj-oJEjCMGVuc2nCaEmfowTjEDXpkry4oUgS032tW3iw3vUEtaX49Iuqi9KKCi3MzKhdvkpQWtB0eIXzsu1DLWSOovrQuw0_ju2Jh7FjP6vVKpaiWOPeoHLsACEeNnhsNYxE_Tvqd8L3JcYZlMvrzwyB0NhUfEsn9pd5jqIOyep0U3_FZuolnLCUJnEGeKtIYSDNECAtBm4tRceUsi_nZIU6)

I want to do all I can to protect our voting rights. With your support, we can PUSH BACK against the Democrats' far Left agenda and protect our American values.

Thank you,
Tim Scott

name: Wendy Rogers
subject: Important Arizona Audit Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE
body:
Important information |
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57787748:6XILRKlNE:m:1:3253819041:F211ACD9A18F836820B34CEC4BF7E293:r)
---
| Hi Peter,

I walked the floor for three hours at the Arizona Audit, and I have some things to say.

First, let me say that the media wouldn't know the truth if they were hit over the head with it. The scope of their misreporting has been borderline legally actionable.

Second, Katie Hobbs is an inveterate liar whose incompetence and fraud are being revealed through this audit.

Third, anyone who still trusts the Dominion voting machines at this point, either wants fraud or is too lazy to hand count the ballots.

I am Senator Wendy Rogers, the Arizona State Senator who was a pivotal vote for the audit. I have been to the audit and I wanted to share the REAL scoop with you. **[Can you help me get the truth out so people understand what's REALLY happening at the audit?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57787748:6XILRKlNE:m:1:3253819041:F211ACD9A18F836820B34CEC4BF7E293:r)**
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57787748:6XILRKlNE:m:1:3253819041:F211ACD9A18F836820B34CEC4BF7E293:r)
---
| _**Here are some of my takeaways from the tour of the audit yesterday:**_

There has been an increase in capacity now:

From 17 to 32 paper inspection tables using microscopic cameras;
From 20 to 44 counting tables (yellow, green, blue);
From 4 to 12 aggregation tables.

The pace is picking up daily, with more audit forensics done each day. This process will be done soon!

Theoretically, mail-in ballots should all be of the same type, composition, and fiber with little to no variance. So if variances ARE seen, there should be an explanation; if there is no explanation, then that is a gap.

_These are issues we can address with additional future legislation._

703 precincts were condensed down to 175 precincts. Every precinct has different ballots. Thus, if your ballot was "printed on demand", then the paper in those situations could legitimately vary... but the paper should not vary for mail-in ballots.

We now DO finally have the deleted databases folder that was missing for some time.

1\. Despite news accounts, it really WAS deleted. The media got this wrong, shockingly.
2\. It was CyFIR who discovered this, and they are none other than the firm who discovered the June 2015 U.S. Government Office of Personnel Management (OPM) breach, where SF86 forms used for Top Secret security clearances were compromised. The bad guys had been infiltrated into OPM for three years.
3\. Here is the reason that the databases are important:

Let's say a ballot box's pink slip says there are 200 ballots contained in the box. Really, only 99 physical ballots are actually IN the box (yes this is happening a LOT).

There should be TWO cross-references to verify this. The Dominion machine would have a batch number corresponding to that grouping of ballots AND Dominion should have the scanned imagery to similarly correlate to those ballots. Where are the remaining 101 ballots? Are they imaged in Dominion? Is their batch number tallied in Dominion? That's why we need the databases.

Noteworthy that both Dominion and Secretary Hobbs have declined the invitation to observe the audit, however everything is still being video recorded.

_Now, will the AZ Audit be enough?_

Yes, because it will inform legislation necessary to plug the gaps to restore the public's confidence. That is the reason the Arizona Senate is doing this, so we know the loopholes and can close them.

There was a helpful debrief from the Cyber Ninjas CEO. Here are the highlights:

1\. This has never been done before.
2\. It's really important for our democracy to be transparent.
3\. Unfortunately, technology has gotten in the way rather than helping.
4\. Where will we be if voters think their votes don't matter anymore?
5\. We have a solid AZ Audit team that is ready and capable to get it done.
6\. This is a calling. We will overcome any and every obstacle.
7\. He can't wait till it's over so that the participants can talk all they want about what they've seen!
8\. Physical data collection will be completed by the end of June. The report will follow sometime later.

I was also able to speak with a floor volunteer who is a retired USAF pilot. Here's what he had to say:

1\. Chain of custody procedures are as precise and flawless as Strategic Air Command's. Signing off of authenticators' "secrets" was not as stringent as the AZ Audit! Going to the bathroom for 10 minutes requires a sign-off.
2\. Laughable that the AZ Secretary of State said her machines were compromised when she initially said they were unhackable.

Here are the procedures on the floor:
1\. All volunteer counters must be from Maricopa county and have voted in the November 2020 election (they must have skin in the game).
2\. Tally sheets and ballots can physically move only if 3 things are present:
People
Paper
Camera
3\. Three components to the AZ Audit layout: Counting - Aggregation - Forensics.
4\. Every worker treats the process on the floor as if he were in a court of law.

As you can see, and I could verify with my own two eyes, this audit is being carried out with the greatest of care and by true professionals who know what they are doing and care about our democratic processes.

The transparency here has been remarkable. Every citizen can visit the video feed and witness what's going on.

_**The best practices being developed here can be used for future audits, such as those being considered in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and other states. **_
---

| We knew there was something wrong with the 2020 election at the beginning of this process. Already we are troubled by several issues and discrepancies that need to be sorted out.

I'm so glad we did this audit! But it only happened because I won my seat in a swing district!

**I'm thrilled to see movements for audits in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and other places. They can use the procedures we developed for the Arizona audit!**

_The machines are a problem. The procedures were faulty. We clearly have work ahead of us to guarantee election integrity in Arizona._

[Stand with me so we can finish the job!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57787748:6XILRKlNE:m:1:3253819041:F211ACD9A18F836820B34CEC4BF7E293:r)

_I am bringing you updates because we know the worthless media will not. I want you to know the truth- the media only wants to shill for the leftist Democrats._

| | Derek,

In one week, our grassroots team faces our biggest test yet: the first end-of-quarter deadline of the general election.

When our fundraising report becomes public, I want to show Glenn Youngkin a huge number. I want him to understand just how united Democrats across the country are to stop him.

[**That's why I’ve set a goal of finding 10,000 contributions before next week's end-of-quarter deadline. Will you donate right now and do your part?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31253655/292076225/1097049879?refcode=20210623.1_TM_BP-A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjcyZWFkMC0xYmQ0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Et1o1mgjk6x4Junr_0Q3icPD1538BgBOWVAenvPTiKM=)

Derek, it’s this simple. Either we defeat Glenn Youngkin because we built the biggest grassroots donor army in the history of Virginia or we lose because we didn’t.

Here’s why your support is important:

Glenn Youngkin outraised us by a huge margin at the last reporting deadline. He already bought the Republican nomination with his deep pockets and now he wants to buy the Governor’s office.

The hard truth is that, if we don’t get a historic grassroots response, his money advantage will just keep growing.

We'll keep falling behind in resources, and one day soon, we'll start falling behind in the polls.

Don’t let it happen, Derek. We can’t let Glenn Youngkin do to Virginia what Donald Trump did to America.

[**We can win, but only if you join me right now. clean_body: One week until the end-of-quarter deadline. | | | = | | Derek, In one week, our grassroots team faces our biggest test yet: the first end-of-quarter deadline of the general election. When our fundraising report becomes public, I want to show Glenn Youngkin a huge number. I want him to understand just how united Democrats across the country are to stop him. = Derek, it’s this simple. Either we defeat Glenn Youngkin because we built the biggest grassroots donor army in the history of Virginia or we lose because we didn’t. Here’s why your support is important: Glenn Youngkin outraised us by a huge margin at the last reporting deadline. He already bought the Republican nomination with his deep pockets and now he wants to buy the Governor’s office. The hard truth is that, if we don’t get a historic grassroots response, his money advantage will just keep growing. We'll keep falling behind in resources, and one day soon, we'll start falling behind in the polls. Don’t let it happen, Derek. We can’t let Glenn Youngkin do to Virginia what Donald Trump did to America. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, \-- Terry = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Stefanie Sass
subject: We can do this
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Nikki is going to beat Ron DeSantis next year. Here’s why:

She’s the only Democrat to win statewide in Florida since 2012. In 2018, Nikki built a broad coalition and won a close race for Commissioner of Agriculture. She’s done it before, and she’ll do it again.

Floridians are ready for something new. Nikki ran for office for the first time just three years ago. She’s a fresh voice who’s running to break Florida’s corrupt, rigged system.

When people underestimate Nikki, she wins. As a leader at the University of Florida, an attorney, and a first-time candidate, Nikki has spent years hearing critics tell her to stay still and wait her turn.
She didn’t listen--and she won.

Friends, if you’re ready to stop Ron DeSantis and try something new, click here to donate to Nikki’s campaign for Governor today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nfstefupdate0621]

Ron DeSantis is dangerous: he’s raised our taxes, attacked our rights, and ignored numerous environmental threats. Winning this race is critical to securing Florida’s future.

Here’s the other piece: national Republicans LOVE Ron DeSantis, and they want him to run for President in 2024. But we can ruin that plan by making him a one-term governor.

Your support helps us break Florida’s rigged, corrupt system and stop DeSantis’ dangerous agenda. If you’re ready to win next year, click here to chip in now and support Nikki’s campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nfstefupdate0621]

Thanks,

Stefanie Sass
Finance Director

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Fundraising is the worst part of running for office
#

Friend,
Honestly, fundraising is the worst part of running for office. I hate it. You hate it.
It’s probably not your favorite part either, but I’ll explain why it’s so important.
[(And then I hope you’ll pitch in a few bucks to put us in a strong position for our upcoming FEC fundraising deadline.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31267202/292118031/-347207331?refcode2=dfe0b555-34d4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210623-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmUwYjU1NS0zNGQ0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0n5--mfPept-t0gyziODlubHndKyTD8RV6X2Ur4dnw=)
One week from today, we'll close the books on this fundraising quarter. And after we do that, we're legally required to publicly report how much money we've raised.
That's a good thing! Transparency is so important for our democracy.
But it also means everyone watching our race will know exactly how much money we've got and where it came from.
Then they'll use what's in our public report to determine the strength of our grassroots movement.
So we set a goal to reach a huge milestone of 20,000 grassroots contributions for the quarter.
That's a number that will show everyone how serious we are about our fight to build a government that actually works for working people.
**It's an ambitious goal, but it's one that I know we can hit if everyone pitches in. So, friend, even though I hate to do it, here's the part where I have to make that fundraising ask:**
[Can you make your first donation to own a piece of our movement today? We need to bring in 5,000 more online donations by our federally mandated deadline next week, and every contribution, no matter the size, goes a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31267206/292118035/-347207331?refcode2=dfe0b555-34d4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210623-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmUwYjU1NS0zNGQ0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0n5--mfPept-t0gyziODlubHndKyTD8RV6X2Ur4dnw=)

I know it can be hard to imagine that what we do today will make such a big impact in an election that’s months away, but it’s true. That’s why your contribution is so important.
Thanks so much for your support.

It’s probably not your favorite part either, but I’ll explain why it’s so important. = One week from today, we'll close the books on this fundraising quarter. And after we do that, we're legally required to publicly report how much money we've raised. That's a good thing! Transparency is so important for our democracy. But it also means everyone watching our race will know exactly how much money we've got and where it came from. Then they'll use what's in our public report to determine the strength of our grassroots movement. So we set a goal to reach a huge milestone of 20,000 grassroots contributions for the quarter. That's a number that will show everyone how serious we are about our fight to build a government that actually works for working people. It's an ambitious goal, but it's one that I know we can hit if everyone pitches in. So, friend, even though I hate to do it, here's the part where I have to make that fundraising ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = I said from day one of this race that we’re not taking a dime from corporate PACs, their lobbyists, or the fossil fuel industry. And I’m incredibly proud of that. You should be, too. I know it can be hard to imagine that what we do today will make such a big impact in an election that’s months away, but it’s true. That’s why your contribution is so important. Thanks so much for your support. Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe. But similar to their feelings about me, the Democrats are not fond of Yvette’s work to save President Trump’s America First policies in Washington. While the election may not be this month or even this year - we must begin the groundwork to protect the seats we flipped last cycle, like Yvette’s, TODAY. - JOIN JIM JORDAN - We only need a few more conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation - but we cannot afford to lose even one of the seats we picked up in 2020. name: Karen Bass Finance Team
subject: Georgia's purging voter files. Again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7ZIRLWwtuXWAOL2EFGpLniLk_1AP-Tq-XNUxBfDI-Tw=/MMVfPqY_944oN_MqchIEU05gA-7fEzkPISXAvNVtWSU=?gpsid=39_132_19484&refcode=em21_210623_mcbth_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210623_mcbth_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)
"Here We Go Again: Georgia Purges 100,000 Voters from Registration Files"

This is voter suppression, team -- and it's coming hot on the heels of Georgia's new voting law that has been dubbed "Jim Crow 2.0."

**With this new wave of voter suppression, the stakes are even higher for Rep. Lucy McBath (GA-06).** The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee named Lucy to their Frontline program, meaning she's one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection.

Karen is rushing immediate support to Lucy to help her combat these racist voter suppression tactics and defend the Democratic majority.

**[Will you help out, friend? Split a donation to Karen and Lucy's campaigns today before the upcoming FEC deadline to help them prepare for the midterms. Any amount will make a difference in this battleground race.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7ZIRLWwtuXWAOL2EFGpLniLk_1AP-Tq-XNUxBfDI-Tw=/MMVfPqY_944oN_MqchIEU05gA-7fEzkPISXAvNVtWSU=?gpsid=39_132_19484&refcode=em21_210623_mcbth_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210623_mcbth_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Grassroots organizing and aggressive voter mobilization efforts are how Georgia carried us across the finish line in the last election. Republicans are scared, and it's why they're wielding the oldest trick in the book to stop Democrats from winning big again.

It's no secret that the new voter suppression law directly targets Black and brown communities. It bans volunteers from giving away food and drinks to voters waiting in lines, limits the number of absentee ballot drop boxes, and more.

And with the Georgia Secretary of State planning to purge 101,789 names from their voter files -- we need to start building winning campaigns **now**. Lucy needs our help.

**[Donate to Karen and Lucy's campaigns before the upcoming FEC deadline to help defend our vulnerable majority in the House. By investing early, we can win big again.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7ZIRLWwtuXWAOL2EFGpLniLk_1AP-Tq-XNUxBfDI-Tw=/MMVfPqY_944oN_MqchIEU05gA-7fEzkPISXAvNVtWSU=?gpsid=39_132_19484&refcode=em21_210623_mcbth_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210623_mcbth_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Thank you,

Karen Bass Finance Team

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/7ZIRLWwtuXWAOL2EFGpLniLk_1AP-Tq-XNUxBfDI-Tw=/MMVfPqY_944oN_MqchIEU05gA-7fEzkPISXAvNVtWSU=?gpsid=39_132_19484&refcode=em21_210623_mcbth_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210623_mcbth_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

918 Pennsylvania Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: I don’t know if we’ll make it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
We’re a long way away.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31272971/292141852/-2023814932?refcode=20210623.2_EW_BQ-B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTA1NDdlMS00M2Q0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZcZfejpKteKPG3_IHxbpWrE3Rz2738BJW5X6zvlf9lY=)

| | Here’s the deal, Derek: when Terry won the primary two weeks ago, we saw a huge wave of support, and it seemed like we were on the path to building the strongest grassroots army in Virginia history.

Now? Not so much.

Take a look at this chart I pulled from ActBlue that shows how donations dropped just days after our promising surge of momentum: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31272973/292141853/1097049879?refcode=20210623.2_EW_BQ-B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTA1NDdlMS00M2Q0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZcZfejpKteKPG3_IHxbpWrE3Rz2738BJW5X6zvlf9lY=)
We set an optimistic goal of 10,000 contributions by midnight next Wednesday based on your enthusiasm, but now, I honestly don’t know if we’ll make it.

**[Please, prove me wrong. Donate right now. Let’s reverse this trend and build the kind of grassroots army that will elect Terry and protect Virginia’s progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31272975/292141856/1097049879?refcode=20210623.2_EW_BQ-B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTA1NDdlMS00M2Q0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZcZfejpKteKPG3_IHxbpWrE3Rz2738BJW5X6zvlf9lY=)**

We’re a long way from hitting our goal right now, Derek, and that could spell disaster for us and for Virginia.

BUT -- if anyone can pull this off, it’s you. We’re counting on you.

Ellie Warner
Finance Director
Terry for Virginia | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31272977/292141858/-2023814932?refcode=20210623.2_EW_BQ-B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTA1NDdlMS00M2Q0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZcZfejpKteKPG3_IHxbpWrE3Rz2738BJW5X6zvlf9lY=)

name: Team Franchot
subject: Check out our new video!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter,
We’re very excited to share with you our newest video straight from the campaign trail! Shot during our Meet and Greet at the Heavy Seas Taproom in Halethorpe, it features a few familiar faces sharing why they support Peter Franchot for Governor.
You can watch the video right here at this link. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsheavyseas?amount=20.22]
We need your help to get our new video in front of as many eyes as possible. Will you chip in what you can to help spread the word that our people-powered movement is growing stronger by the day? The more we can raise, the more people we can reach!
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsheavyseas?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsheavyseas?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsheavyseas?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsheavyseas?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsheavyseas]Peter Franchot has the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials hailing from all across the state. During his time in public office, he has visited every community from Accident to Crisfield, and every ZIP code in between. He’s built an unparalleled coalition of allies and partners from all corners of Maryland, and he’s going to work hand-in-hand with them to secure a brighter and stronger future for every community in 2022.
Help us spread the word about all of the elected officials that support Peter Franchot for Governor! Anything you can give to help us get the video out to Democratic voters is greatly appreciated! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsheavyseas?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsheavyseas?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Team Mondaire
subject: One year ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

One year ago today, Mondaire won an 8-person primary and became the Democratic nominee for Congress in NY-17. The rest is history!
During his campaign, the political establishment counted Mondaire out. They never imagined that someone with his story could win in Westchester and Rockland Counties. But with the help of committed supporters like you, he overcame the odds to make American history.
We’re so proud of Mondaire for all he’s already accomplished. Just recently, Axios named him the most active freshman in the entire Congress, including both the House and the Senate.
But if we want to keep Mondaire in Congress fighting for the issues we all care about — voting rights, policing reform, protections for LGBTQ+ Americans, universal child care, student debt forgiveness, and Supreme Court expansion — we need to raise enough money to make sure we can send Mondaire back to Washington.
That’s where you come in. Please, if you’re able:
**[Make a contribution of $5 or more to Mondaire’s re-election campaign — on the one-year anniversary of his primary win — to show your support for all his hard work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31275642/292151784/-254107743?refcode2=24ea9d15-4ad4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210623-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGVhOWQxNS00YWQ0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhEovdQ68js_ki9RqKrls_Xz-X-v6QofShxC8XTeMdc=)**
Mondaire's primary win one year ago today paved the way for him to make history as the first openly gay, Black member of Congress, and in just six months in office, he has accomplished so much on behalf of the American people. And he's just getting started.
With your support, we can start Mondaire’s re-election campaign off strong so he can keep being a leader for us in Congress.
Thank you for reading, and thank you for supporting Mondaire on this journey. We couldn’t have made it this far without you!
\- Team Mondaire
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31275643/292151785/-254107743?refcode2=24ea9d15-4ad4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210623-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGVhOWQxNS00YWQ0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhEovdQ68js_ki9RqKrls_Xz-X-v6QofShxC8XTeMdc=)**

But if we want to keep Mondaire in Congress fighting for the issues we all care about — voting rights, policing reform, protections for LGBTQ+ Americans, universal child care, student debt forgiveness, and Supreme Court expansion — we need to raise enough money to make sure we can send Mondaire back to Washington. That’s where you come in. Please, if you’re able: = Mondaire's primary win one year ago today paved the way for him to make history as the first openly gay, Black member of Congress, and in just six months in office, he has accomplished so much on behalf of the American people. And he's just getting started. With your support, we can start Mondaire’s re-election campaign off strong so he can keep being a leader for us in Congress. Thank you for reading, and thank you for supporting Mondaire on this journey. We couldn’t have made it this far without you! \- Team Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: BREAKING: Republicans are attacking me for protecting our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hello -- Last night, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans blocked the _For the People Act._ This bill would have worked to protect and expand voting rights, end voter suppression tactics, and stop billionaires from buying our elections. Our democracy is sacred, but for too long it has been working for the special interests instead of for the people. I was proud to help introduce the _For the People Act_ , and I will keep working to get dark money out of politics. Every American deserves full access to the ballot box -- and we need to make it easier to vote, not harder. But the moment I voted to advance the _For the People Act_ , the GOP launched a massive six-figure campaign against me in New Hampshire. I only won by 1,017 votes in 2016, and with Mitch McConnell only needing to flip one seat to take back control, I’m his number one target. National Republicans, special interest groups, and dark money billionaires are spending big on attack ads. We can’t match their massive war chest, but we can’t fall too far behind. **[That’s why I need your help: can you rush $5 or more to protect this crucial Senate seat and stop Mitch McConnell?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31275960/292152779/1251890980?refcode=e20210623_mh-FTPA-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDQzNjliNy00YmQ0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IK4QlBYmA1xlFmX6D568BVZFB1dxIreKrd9h4Vj-IP8=)** We can’t give up any ground in the fight to protect our democracy. body:
I came within 5 percentage points of defeating one of the most entrenched Democrats in Congress. And quite frankly, it was because of conservatives li I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=847b2df9025345e084dcba923715cbd2&_e=D5_hEMC2GnBGCfq9sMDFgPbsxRywJrPNmFS0dwxDU329SPxotYByXJ4RRG6Q3s7j8LgeL5azpiAXiea5x2gUZbIMj-ttpHOErcMnVR9cpY9DHBxcJSENKr04OZnStiqw9w_hXSVMBFxhGspYpN4hAVMM2IERHmUx2Db5qQNU89p05aIRWPnSiX0stIx6XrXLx2QuEz1obRNGEwuxPzViGe3_dG2LHxKrZEzg9nKU3suF29TZ5Aa4_rwNFNR3MGHFy9WClOxa0xw7xth20rXnIpfR14LF43WxYmtATlqbPA-s3puzs6NJ9DLsAtEZ6ynwPm-FbyPgFQmPlVtLLU-iMF7uLPvb5YWQ5LH2buGs-3dyk3L-ZsDzhO6CRm02P3H3dAePrfPGHJjEt-JMwHd_eJrBpx0EQzODdDPhoGibqIY%3D)
---
Peter,

I know you have better things to be doing than reading about a congressional race a full 1.5 years before Election Day, but for me, **talking, writing, and emailing about this race is currently my life.** It’s all consuming, and I wouldn’t have it any other way.

Last year, I came within 5 percentage points of defeating one of the most entrenched Democrats in Congress. And quite frankly, it was because of conservatives like YOU. The kind words of encouragement helped get us through campaigning during a pandemic; **[the generous donations enabled us to outspend my opponent and attract the support from the national Republican Party.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=847b2df9025345e084dcba923715cbd2&_e=D5_hEMC2GnBGCfq9sMDFgPbsxRywJrPNmFS0dwxDU329SPxotYByXJ4RRG6Q3s7j8LgeL5azpiAXiea5x2gUZbIMj-ttpHOErcMnVR9cpY9DHBxcJSENKr04OZnStiqw9w_hXSVMBFxhGspYpN4hAVMM2IERHmUx2Db5qQNU89p05aIRWPnSiX0stIx6XrXLx2QuEz1obRNGEwuxPzViGbKOlay_4GGL1HUoL7buTAdQIuzSY9DXXg8chjX5nMOSSHCDNI7lDP-ia8dz-ii5kfGh0u_nQTkFQlaRRBnO2_ifhLC0Izzuz9zOoDU-Z3QGMF01TeXrlSX0ka3MDfuxtppVy4ROo16Mo9_HvufFLI5Hnup7dQjSZr7UGgBOfUGmNxV-Tx8FhVfIl6tkyrC-K1elL8LtT2lMct6VGHNZvJo%3D)**

Friend, it’s more clear than ever that Americans deserve answers about the origins of the Coronavirus.

_How much did China know? What were they using gain of function for? And why is our own government failing to hold them accountable? _

I'm putting the pressure on Fauci and Biden to hold China accountable and I discussed it on Fox News earlier this week. **[WATCH NOW>>](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=2a061bf624dd40239ab2d9a17996b534&_e=aNxttIedDaMuCZEHaPvFXHXQ5ne3T5r7YRL6i_ej3aMQVIUqz_C5K3V1-Nqxaa4lWjqYD0g-kUZAZwGqDSmxuTurPL64Wg-U5YKGpj1qEKL5mI0HxqOf9_u9dU3h2i0lsWntKnRwxoUwJvQp9t6JB58zeUq9ZtRtFWrKm12ah7c7O6Pa_r9m7Ls5Mri7NqYzMPOVy8b7d-oNY5_L73THch-eH2LDTF0Kc6rXtQeVKEirwUDO6CRSj7VMUZwFTGu4XJKALtgkLoWtV1RrLaqjL9_klnTW888KKTfh6Zg7dhBLpaqsMUvyNcGADnRQaUf4DjAyLUt-gD9VfARM8VDIEBEC0DYa-taBgqoAyCN03APXWZMTTSgtUprTpPggBgpCnXAlGmipzXvOIdCgwLAPwX98RsvgAMAtHRRidsaXB-SSmYtf4_KziqR0CH3Lfjk7J0DX72qv_NQIkYI54qTLXg%3D%3D)

**
[](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=2a061bf624dd40239ab2d9a17996b534&_e=aNxttIedDaMuCZEHaPvFXHXQ5ne3T5r7YRL6i_ej3aMQVIUqz_C5K3V1-Nqxaa4lWjqYD0g-kUZAZwGqDSmxuTurPL64Wg-U5YKGpj1qEKL5mI0HxqOf9_u9dU3h2i0lsWntKnRwxoUwJvQp9t6JB58zeUq9ZtRtFWrKm12ah7c7O6Pa_r9m7Ls5Mri7NqYzMPOVy8b7d-oNY5_L73THch-eH2LDTF0Kc6rXtQeVKEirwUDO6CRSj7VMUZwFTGu4ljA938otQJXhC31_DRaqc_aP__9PGOLN7sUU2rHwlncyeY2x1Y01Rv8jFtLVdxy9Hgm-9mbJS2euJdxV4Pp72PM0GxUrjpi35D80Xgk8T-MHnLegE7-X6FniEWODbwfJvP4fWKf_hD3jp1NMm4KbU46GL4KRZeikDVt83mmu1-urOuHg6BKZp-NnsbA2xltm59zJ5wySsND9fj8SwunHtQ%3D%3D)

We’ve seen enough of the excuses about China’s role in COVID-19.

Now, we’re all dealing with the very serious consequences of the pandemic that China clearly had a large role in creating.

We can no longer afford to look the other way.

**I'm standing up today to demand answers and accountability. I hope you'll join me by chipping in now:[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-2489856/](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=2a061bf624dd40239ab2d9a17996b534&_e=aNxttIedDaMuCZEHaPvFXHXQ5ne3T5r7YRL6i_ej3aMQVIUqz_C5K3V1-Nqxaa4lWjqYD0g-kUZAZwGqDSmxuTurPL64Wg-U5YKGpj1qEKL5mI0HxqOf9_u9dU3h2i0lsWntKnRwxoUwJvQp9t6JB58zeUq9ZtRtFWrKm12ah7c7O6Pa_r9m7Ls5Mri7NqYzMPOVy8b7d-oNY5_L73THch-eH2LDTF0Kc6rXtQeVKEirwUDO6CRSj7VMUZwFTGu4APnmJal6gBXFay_xlqbk7ghGtfApPJPGooU-sCkRIVkAtuEZuVYJ9t1N3GvaBckRqu429ljbx6axiH_oVIWhQjE5XhIib-VH2OFSOfVm0668nhMUj8lOt_C_B5ZS_7WrMT8YbEDF3Fp70BpORpgmT7-jtj6dLgvzX5SpmW24xN1mGgWwd_f2x_d5DYPIqySXmyIDJ4EjJfUlAyXQsZNwhA%3D%3D)**

name: bob@mark4ohio.com bob@mark4ohio.com
subject: MARK PUKITA NEEDS YOU AT SATURDAY'S TRUMP RALLY
body:
Hello Mark Pukita For U.S. Senate Supporter,

**President Trump is coming to Wellington, Ohio on Saturday, June 26th!**

Mark needs as many people as possible to be there handing out campaign flyers to the thousands who will be there. **See Attached!!**

If you're attending the rally, please meet our **Campaign Manager,** **ROBERT GRAY, **at **GOOD SAMARITAN CHURCH **in Wellington.

Here's the address:

**GOOD SAMARITAN CHURCH OF WELLINGTON**
[215 Brown St, Wellington, OH 44090-1130, United States Wellington, OH 44090](https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=41.16946%2C-82.21131&fbclid=IwAR0EZzjHyRv_FQKcAVYJ8DDjXSUwIGOm5wBb72I621dYDcHB5hiz9eRy4OE)

Robert will be in the church parking lot at **12:00 NOON** with flyers and instructions for all of you.
Please look for the **Pukita for Senate Signs** near the entrance of the church!

Thanks for your help and support for Mark!!

**Bob Nicholson**

**Volunteer Engagement Coordinator**
**Pukita for U.S. Senate 2022**
**Mark4Ohio.com**
**740.739.7287 - Voice/Text**

name: Ready for Stacey
subject: FWD: The GOP wants authoritarianism

|

| | **We told you this was coming.** Mitch McConnell defeated the For the People Act yesterday, using the filibuster, lies, and his procedural bag of dirty tricks to block voting rights expansion so that GOP legislatures can turn our voting rights back to the Jim Crow era. McConnell and the rest of the GOP have been lying, obstructing, and cheating themselves into perpetual power for far too long, and it's high time we fight back against the GOP's Jim Crow 2.0. That's why we're calling on our grassroots network to donate to our Ready for Stacey Fund. We're focusing all of our efforts to help fuel Stacey's fight to combat voter suppression, and we're counting on you to join us. If you need a refresher on what we're up against, check out our message below. The GOP just scored a major victory in this fight, but we can still win. Our democracy depends on it. When Democrats Turn Out | **[JOIN STACEY'S FIGHT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31278214/292161026/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210623_GEN_FDR_G&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyNGQ1YjBjLTUxZDQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5r1G_HgaT9WdVDTUNFQ9WC_lexEWEpI8D_DhfDWfMOs=)**

| | Hi Peter, The GOP is entirely focused on ELIMINATING your right to vote, and a new report by the Brennan Center for Justice proves it. The report identified **389 bills across 48 states** that are aimed at keeping Democratic voters from the ballot box, keeping Democractic leaders out of power, and helping far-right GOP legislatures overturn any election they don't like \-- all in their steady march towards authoritarianism. **But Stacey Abrams has a plan to fight back.** Her fight against voter suppression in Georgia has gone national, and our Ready for Stacey Fund is focusing all of its resources on helping Stacey Abrams win this fight. | **[DONATE TO JOIN ABRAMS' FIGHT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31278215/292161027/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210623_GEN_FDR_G&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyNGQ1YjBjLTUxZDQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5r1G_HgaT9WdVDTUNFQ9WC_lexEWEpI8D_DhfDWfMOs=)**
---

**Peter, the GOP has their targets set on Stacey Abrams.** They know they have to tear her down, otherwise she'll overthrow their plot to destroy democracy.

**[Which means that their dark money is starting to flow, meanwhile, our fundraising has dried up. Please, Peter \-- you've had Stacey Abrams' back before, and she needs you now again. If you care about saving democracy and stopping the far-right GOP legislatures that are eroding it, please rush a donation of $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can to help us support Abrams in her fight TODAY.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31278216/292161028/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210623_GEN_FDR_G&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyNGQ1YjBjLTUxZDQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5r1G_HgaT9WdVDTUNFQ9WC_lexEWEpI8D_DhfDWfMOs=)**

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: DNC to defeat MTG in 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Dear Peter -- Democrats have made me their number one target to
remove from Congress.
In fact, they've even recruited Democrat
National Committee Super Delegate Wendy Davis to defeat me in
2022.

DEFEND MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE - CHIP IN
5 BEFORE END-OF-QUARTER DEADLINE
Wendy Davis is an open-borders socialist who
supports stimulus checks to Illegal Immigrants, teaching our
children to hate America through dangerous Critical Race Theory
indoctrination, violent BLM and Antifa mobs, and wants to strip
away our gun rights.
She is handpicked by the Hillary
Clinton/Stacey Abrams wing of the Democrat party.
They are prepared to unleash MILLIONS of
dollars to take me out. Some political experts even expect
$15-$20 million spent against me. . .
And not just the Democrats.
The Never Trump Lincoln Project and the Liz
Cheney wing of the Republican party want me gone.

This is exactly why I must ask you to chip in
5 right now.
And in just eight days, I have one of the
most critical fundraising deadlines in my political career: the
End-of-Quarter reports.

These reports are what Democrat operatives
and Fake News "journalists" comb through just to see how strong
my support is amongst the people.
They use these reports to allocate Democrat
resources amongst the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress.
They even deploy Democrats from across the
country to knock doors, make phone calls, write emails, and
spread Fake News on social media. . .
All in an effort to defeat me in 2022!
As you can see, I strongly need your help,
Peter.
You've stood with me before. I must ask you
to stand with me again right now by chipping in 5 to help
me DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS.
Please hurry, the deadline is just eight days
away!
The bigger my campaign warchest, the bigger
chance I have to fend off Hillary Clinton's and Stacey Abrams'
Democrats.
I am fighting every single day to stop these
socialists in Congress who want to rip this country a part and
rebuild it into their socialist hellhole.
I will never stop fighting. I will never give
up. I will never back down.
hope I can count on you!

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Friend, do you have a second to look at this?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**_June FEC Fundraising Deadline_**
**Contribution Goal:** 100,000
**Deadline Day:** June 30th
**Suggested Donation:** $3
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210623-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=836_6688874_i7pSqe&akid=836%2E6688874%2Ei7pSqe)**
Friends —
We have our June FEC fundraising deadline coming up quickly, so here’s a quick rundown of the days ahead:
* Our goal is to get **100,000 contributions** by the public deadline to show the strength of this team.
* So we need to keep up the pace, we only have 7 days left to get it done, so we’re coming directly to you and asking for your support.

Our goal is based on the number of people donating — not a dollar amount, because your contribution is more important than the amount you can give.
And usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about hitting our goal. But two new Republican candidates announced this month that they are running against Mark in 2022 — that brings us to three opponents total now.
**You can see how important your support is to holding this seat, which is why today we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21&amount=3&refcode=em210623-1-subs?t=2&refcode2=836_6688874_i7pSqe&akid=836%2E6688874%2Ei7pSqe)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210623-1-subs&t=15&refcode2=836_6688874_i7pSqe&akid=836%2E6688874%2Ei7pSqe)**

| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210623-1-subs&t=17&refcode2=836_6688874_i7pSqe&akid=836%2E6688874%2Ei7pSqe)**

| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210623-1-subs&t=18&refcode2=836_6688874_i7pSqe&akid=836%2E6688874%2Ei7pSqe)**

| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210623-1-subs&t=19&refcode2=836_6688874_i7pSqe&akid=836%2E6688874%2Ei7pSqe)**

We are going to hold this seat because people like you believed in our campaign from the start.
So thank you in advance for chipping in!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210623-1-subs&t=21&refcode2=836_6688874_i7pSqe&akid=836%2E6688874%2Ei7pSqe)**

Picture it, Friend: You've been saving and saving month after month - a few hundred dollars here and there, maybe $50 you have left over at the end of the week - all to fund a well-deserved vacation for you and your family.
Then, the unthinkable happens. The world shuts down as a pandemic ravages every continent. People lose their jobs. People lose their friends, their family members, their own lives. It becomes excruciatingly difficult just to "get by" as the economy teeters on the brink of a depression.
And those thousands of dollars in airline tickets purchased for the vacation that never happened? Does it get returned to help during this challenging time? That hard-earned money never made it back into your bank account. No - instead, airline giants sent out _credits_ to use those flights at another time, and then had the nerve to give those credits an expiration date.
**This is precisely what happened to millions of Americans. Major airlines - worth collectively tens of billions of dollars - refused to refund ticket holders during the pandemic, and now, they are trying to put an expiry date on when Americans can use the travel they _already paid for._**
If you're as outraged as I am, then join me in taking action. I've been leading the charge in the Senate to hold airlines accountable for passively robbing Americans of their hard-earned money, and I could use your help. **[Will you sign my petition now urging Congress to hold airlines accountable for refusing to put consumers first during the coronavirus pandemic?](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-airlines-consumer-protection?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1038-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1038-su-nd)**
| | | [Yes](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-airlines-consumer-protection?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1038-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1038-su-nd) | [No](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-airlines-consumer-protection?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1038-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1038-su-nd)
---|---
There is a light at the end of the tunnel in America, Friend. The vast majority of Americans have received at least one COVID vaccine dose. Infection rates are dropping wherever vaccination rates climb. Businesses are reopening. And with the July 4 holiday coming up, many Americans are hoping to return to a more normal life and begin traveling again. They deserve it.
But now, as things are finally opening up more than a year after the pandemic began, the paltry one-year expiration dates airlines set on flight vouchers have long since passed. So not only have people lost their planned travel...they have actually been robbed at the same time. The airlines should, at bare minimum, let consumers use these promised vouchers at any time. After all, it was the American taxpayers who bailed the airline industry out of this crisis, and there should be no blank-check industry bailouts without a commitment to consumer protection.
**[I need 500 more people to sign my petition before our 11:59 p.m. deadline, but I still don't have your name, Friend. Will you speak out now and urge Congress to hold giant airlines accountable for refusing to put consumers first?](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-airlines-consumer-protection?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1038-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1038-su-nd)**
| | | [Yes](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-airlines-consumer-protection?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1038-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1038-su-nd) | [No](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-airlines-consumer-protection?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1038-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1038-su-nd)
---|---
Thank you,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1038-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=R4ml9cPqJ%2BZeGVud4raxAJur0klICQeP&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

name: Conservative Alerts
subject: Maggie Hassan votes FOR S. 1 - and against the people of New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Maggie Hassan and her Democrat colleagues have voted for the politicians, and against election integrity

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fretire-hassan/1/0100017a397e7042-4d4597b9-b6b3-43d8-b51f-31f91d89363d-000000/Gr0AuWpx4UFfWzcrHbQVcCWHVTk=219)
---
| | Derek,

Yesterday, Maggie Hassan voted for the Democrat-backed S. 1 bill, and against the people of New Hampshire.

S. 1 would have _banned voter ID_ , forced New Hampshire to count _late absentee ballots_ , and used _taxpayer money to fund political campaigns_. This Democrat wish list would have put election integrity at risk, and given control over our elections to DC.

[It's time to hold Maggie Hassan accountable for her radical positions.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fretire-hassan/2/0100017a397e7042-4d4597b9-b6b3-43d8-b51f-31f91d89363d-000000/idfFuT8ZaPg73PBfmchK2zwLcV8=219)

| This is only the most recent example of Maggie Hassan standing with the DC politicians, and against her constituents.

We can't allow out-of-touch politicians like Maggie Hassan to be our voice in DC. She is the most vulnerable Senator in the country, and we must do everything possible to send her to an early retirement.

[Can you donate $10, $25, or even $50 today to help us defeat Maggie Hassan in 2022?](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fretire-hassan/4/0100017a397e7042-4d4597b9-b6b3-43d8-b51f-31f91d89363d-000000/FVBud-uB03IboJhVzgXm4LE4SpM=219) We need new representation, and every donation helps us send a Republican to Washington.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help, Peter
body:
Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. ** ** **In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents...** And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. [**That is why I am urgently asking you and every other American patriot reading this letter to contribute $35 or more to help us sue Twitter and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57792731:JYSZGdl6N:m:1:3253819041:EA65A362D8A3188BA65453003C845044:r) Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57792731:JYSZGdl6N:m:1:3253819041:EA65A362D8A3188BA65453003C845044:r) You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. _**Then it happened ...**_ After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - _who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. _ It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. **And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. ** ** ** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57792731:JYSZGdl6N:m:1:3253819041:EA65A362D8A3188BA65453003C845044:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. **And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought.** You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. _ _ _And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000._ _ _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a one-time contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57792731:JYSZGdl6N:m:1:3253819041:EA65A362D8A3188BA65453003C845044:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? [**I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing any amount to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57792731:JYSZGdl6N:m:1:3253819041:EA65A362D8A3188BA65453003C845044:r) Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57792731:JYSZGdl6N:m:1:3253819041:EA65A362D8A3188BA65453003C845044:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57792731:JYSZGdl6N:m:1:3253819041:EA65A362D8A3188BA65453003C845044:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57792731:JYSZGdl6N:m:1:3253819041:EA65A362D8A3188BA65453003C845044:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57792731:JYSZGdl6N:m:1:3253819041:EA65A362D8A3188BA65453003C845044:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

clean_body: Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents... And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. Then it happened ... After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought. You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. _U.S. Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-GA)_
Fellow American:

The real story behind Covid-19 is a **pandemic of lies**.

For more than a year, politicians, public health “experts,” and media elites have helped the Chinese Communist Party cover up what really happened two years ago in Wuhan.

With a flood of evidence now pointing to the **Wuhan Institute of Virology** as the true source of the novel coronavirus, the global elites’ dam of lies is finally starting to crack.

**[Now, House conservatives need to smash it to smithereens.](http://links.theredmajority.com/u/click?_t=f78dc796b7604f07af5651bb6a6292ab&_m=9f71d2363f0c4e94a29c9114efd74bba&_e=KHKj6Chn9CitYjF1gfo3gQytQ5tK3dr4HHKnuH8HWrn-afZqORG-Aq2tYM79Vx9lz_C2DLW7VfDkdauvztLdvcRKoVbCraYXi5VA061lVT6QA4DA-etkpfkkk3T_To265q7LX6PtxE8NWueLB2Bj4GjOyvM5hfbXcWA2Trk9dmmkL5bqEtO9UtOyG1qWouU8slGxxOmIRBi9zzTSVOaL1fqUrR8_m1xjXO3ghqhDAmPKev4MV1FvScUPztj8ksiklpnIP1FsJ1RraLSNyiYsBQWrc7KwcR55EDBOMg3bqohZEVRY28mMFA2LwmQYhhbWrGivNP36jDk0_4AWsaK2WA%3D%3D)
**
That's why I support a full-court-press investigation into the true origins of Covid-19, including:

▶︎ The “gain of function” research being conducted on coronaviruses at the Wuhan Institute of Virology;

▶︎ The lax safety standards at the Wuhan lab;

▶︎ Chinese communists’ refusal to allow international investigators to examine the facility;

▶︎ Big Tech’s censoring of the evidence for the lab-leak theory during last year’s election campaign;

▶︎ The three Wuhan scientists who got seriously ill in late 2019;

▶︎ National Institutes of Health (NIH) funding of the Wuhan lab and its coronavirus research; and, finally...

▶︎ **What did ANTHONY FAUCI know about the Wuhan coverup, and when did he know it?**

One thing we don’t have to investigate is why the liberal media pretended the Wuhan lab leak story was a conspiracy theory, despite all the evidence.

We know why they lied: because the **truth would have proven PRESIDENT TRUMP WAS RIGHT ABOUT COVID-19 ALL ALONG**.

Now, elites are trying to memory hole their complicity in the racist, sexist, genocidal Chinese communists’ attempt to gaslight the world about the origins of a disease that killed 3 million people.

**[We can’t let them get away with it.](http://links.theredmajority.com/u/click?_t=f78dc796b7604f07af5651bb6a6292ab&_m=9f71d2363f0c4e94a29c9114efd74bba&_e=KHKj6Chn9CitYjF1gfo3gQytQ5tK3dr4HHKnuH8HWrn-afZqORG-Aq2tYM79Vx9lz_C2DLW7VfDkdauvztLdvcRKoVbCraYXi5VA061lVT6QA4DA-etkpfkkk3T_To26Vq5hY1pUq4eV5vK7j2Nb_jMsAMnHe6nEm7ULFsfkPZewkkFKbLdW8PgOs4WGxdCXNyAq-OzQCCfXMR3K7bUsnlKUKO2ppji0Y1FBSV5kE9k9ZxwgHf1HQ21VSgABWgXKy5gXJNpwBf1CuYHRtO1gAV5R908J-LD5bmrIKkBnKkWsSZd44LutSVTu4kr7OKQpF8-TA0CfT8YvjRbrdBCyrQ%3D%3D)**

House conservatives are going to ask every question, follow every lead, and find every whistleblower from here to Wuhan.

But...

Those elites still control the House floor. They control Congress’s subpoena power. They control the agencies we’re going to be questioning and the media who will “report” on our work.

We can start this investigation in 2021, but the only way to finish it will be to take back the U.S. House of Representatives in 2022.

**[And the only way to do that is for the House Freedom Fund to recruit, nominate, and elect true, principled conservatives who will stand up to the Swamp and for the truth.](http://links.theredmajority.com/u/click?_t=f78dc796b7604f07af5651bb6a6292ab&_m=9f71d2363f0c4e94a29c9114efd74bba&_e=KHKj6Chn9CitYjF1gfo3gQytQ5tK3dr4HHKnuH8HWrn-afZqORG-Aq2tYM79Vx9lz_C2DLW7VfDkdauvztLdvcRKoVbCraYXi5VA061lVT6QA4DA-etkpfkkk3T_To265X4ZJaqVyprTufCVtvlTfvVf59Eg3-vYZ6-So4qvox2A_1PU32ZgoITFX0QZNDYUN0PUmaWrEH_-9wONaQg1ca2fwPhfHE8XhZdKOOIRSCOZkTcP7iyM5j3vvbCYCFtNvKZeeI8QOR2oPT-IYbWWF-Z3UN22oJzrUP7N8CHZU-_BI3qUg0bv2pQRnaGhOmelwI0wDltZ1CLzk_veQLp8lg%3D%3D)**

You and I both know that establishment moderates will look for deals with Democrats, not the truth about Covid-19. Only true, fighting conservatives will do what it takes to break through the global elite conspiracy to cover up the coronavirus.

HFF needs your help, today.

**Can I count on you to help America uncover what really happened in Wuhan, and make sure it never happens again?**

Can you help us find the truth?

**[Please support the House Freedom Fund today.](http://links.theredmajority.com/u/click?_t=f78dc796b7604f07af5651bb6a6292ab&_m=9f71d2363f0c4e94a29c9114efd74bba&_e=KHKj6Chn9CitYjF1gfo3gQytQ5tK3dr4HHKnuH8HWrn-afZqORG-Aq2tYM79Vx9lz_C2DLW7VfDkdauvztLdvcRKoVbCraYXi5VA061lVT6QA4DA-etkpfkkk3T_To26VC8woQYAuCk663LQNlTDQi2myqoU8nc7MVD6oUvSQOQXgNih3fvS42lmtHMJdc3jo92FgfuTCFN-2pogKoah5UWpsO1vyPa4p7KK4br-kALzADy2qvTOAYK0OOF8BAa3o0JxP4IBVx6SsX_sbz1_-Oa-hi0dlLdWW3FRtgR1K0j1apwvaL6GovOt2xC1eC4CtuOkyODX78vvrNxi3HcFEw%3D%3D)**

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,
|

body:
Democrats poured millions of dollars into her district

| Hi, Congressman Lee Zeldin here.

As a fellow New Yorker, I am asking every conservative to step up in the next **HOUR** to help Rep. Nicole Malliotakis win in 2022.

**[Can I count on you?](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=b990e5a1748a425da4a5e8ce383cc5e7&_e=215les7E3AJ26aGO1OUdzF_COtg0in3xJrTFaLP9z_Tzq3UQZJkCk2oC_ql5YnLtDVuzcV0i0_2cpu98zFzQUAayKIzTpZy6VUmDjNFmhEy93kN3KWQWZ_C2LBUCHUlS7dcTkw7L6gunaS2MOrKrxi4MuYBdjBWmaQMGiq_iICAlihLe2AWTRrqISGRScQ2bO1_TjG5OMb5iac0L9ZzqFZCB6wPq-BYjd3-6y3CclFOGNrjR8qY4RG27Hv9iQ11o3inCi3ivHKvexuabPcTbbJHBLa0M9yBMp2ZVh2vOoc9XwlgL67utLdBrMk_WtpBIJIzSGR_a0MRjU4cXnb9X3FQ2fRvi8aYweLpJB2nJGBPelVU_HVZTlXdC3qnBycjYtv2OE8W76rATqEX245dYb4Xuc_6UFtNbikKc6Rnh3ZTwDVs0zo3wV4vzyJ5Vx-JbYplolti6D3fP58PoJbqIhpwJQJuALmB_pXDOe-QGpho%3D)** | [**CONTRIBUTE NOW**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=b990e5a1748a425da4a5e8ce383cc5e7&_e=215les7E3AJ26aGO1OUdzF_COtg0in3xJrTFaLP9z_Tzq3UQZJkCk2oC_ql5YnLtDVuzcV0i0_2cpu98zFzQUAayKIzTpZy6VUmDjNFmhEy93kN3KWQWZ_C2LBUCHUlS7dcTkw7L6gunaS2MOrKrxi4MuYBdjBWmaQMGiq_iICAlihLe2AWTRrqISGRScQ2bO1_TjG5OMb5iac0L9ZzqFZCB6wPq-BYjd3-6y3CclFOGNrjR8qY4RG27Hv9iQ11o3inCi3ivHKvexuabPcTbbJNmR9i-Zace6Y9AsjPTuhJSoneeNCaIIajzoLiEjjnNCeCq1ftBzlT5G4sojxPw2mgi4_DHJV7ohofoNU059F1QMBrasVHHun1VteNi4pvgFH_mQ3GEi0hwUUh5Uq_cGyXsMBFhXPIJtTUZPRQI2GyDTTKUsdkvXtLSpDa33JHJ69Fur_iOu0O-WJxtxdyTafUzDdaXLmcWEQlZNOBiTMM%3D)

At the end of the month, we will close our books on our second quarter fundraising. The next morning, our finance team will compile a report for state election officials, and a few days later, **our numbers will be made public for the first time since I became the Democratic nominee.** I’m really proud of this report and what it says about our campaign. You see, this report shares more than just how much we’ve raised — more importantly, it tells the world how many people are with us because they believe in what we’re building together. But to be completely honest, this report makes me a little nervous, too. Now that we’ve won the nomination, everyone from Winsome Sears to state Republicans will comb through our report looking for signs of weakness. And you can bet they will start launching attacks if they think we’re vulnerable. We have to show the Commonwealth just how strong this grassroots team is and prove that we have what it takes to defeat Winsome Sears this November. But right now, we are a little behind where we need to be if we want to hit our goal next week, so I’m hoping you will pitch in to help us catch up. **Will you pitch in $10 — or whatever you can — to say you’re all in for this people-powered movement? name: Team Sarah
subject: Our democracy literally depends on whether we expand the Democratic Senate majority next year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Yesterday, the Senate voted on HR 1, the For the People Act -- legislation that would have strengthened our election security, reformed our campaign finance laws, ended partisan gerrymandering, and so much more. _For Pete's sake_ , it's literally called "For The People."

**You'd think protecting our democracy is something we could all get behind -- but not a single Republican senator agrees, and certainly not Ron Johnson.** Instead of sending this democracy reform bill to President Biden's desk, Senate Republicans blocked the For the People Act from becoming law -- by using the undemocratic filibuster.

**[We know these three things for sure: the filibuster has to go, Ron Johnson has to go, and our democracy literally depends on whether or not we expand the Democratic Senate majority next year. Chip in now to ensure we can get all three done>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31285479/292188299/-521710702?gpsid=50_130_19502&refcode=em21_210623_HR1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210623_HR1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDJjMTRhZi02OGQ0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_CcqCDjherHktgqDhpBky242ijYGJuhU7Z_WPH30JI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31285481/292188300/-521710702?gpsid=50_130_19502&refcode=em21_210623_HR1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210623_HR1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDJjMTRhZi02OGQ0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_CcqCDjherHktgqDhpBky242ijYGJuhU7Z_WPH30JI=)

Here's the deal: it's not just voting rights. Time and time again, Democrats take action For the People while Republicans like Ron Johnson force gridlock and undermine our democracy for their own political gain -- no matter who gets hurt.

Democrats are For the People when it comes to ensuring fair wages and access to quality health care. We're For the People when it comes to civil liberties and fundamental rights. We're For the People when it comes to government representation.

**But every time we try to pass laws to help the people, Republicans like Ron Johnson and Mitch McConnell trample on democracy and abuse the filibuster to block progress.**

**[We can win this fight, but we have to give it our all. Sarah is willing to give everything she can to fight for the people, abolish the filibuster, and take down Ron Johnson once and for all. Chip in to help her get it all done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31285493/292188308/-521710702?gpsid=50_130_19502&refcode=em21_210623_HR1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210623_HR1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDJjMTRhZi02OGQ0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_CcqCDjherHktgqDhpBky242ijYGJuhU7Z_WPH30JI=)**

Team Sarah

body:

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.
