Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ef9c89bc5ca24b3fbbf2694f554e24d6&_e=lYirIdSFxnFwJ_Vh1tTisUp1JNi6s7ykdiL_-AxaJLQ93IJjEhGiO5NsuIZQfLEtVCyk7pyjK6eX1jPie1lbo0Sa_tmscnSCxFgXFyJRvMT-1mxlLztLm_Ci1pB264OPkUeaSVOaihLW491WXPG6XEskOwOLsOzjUQNfoAYAw1--aQisNUKYo_q3J5RXQORuA4PhSMqZlA06VLxGRt3GJ4r7UNX6sV4lg-IxxJW3_Z2u1HU_zqUsCJOzn5tPkt8Kv0tXMZ7Yytgt32dFQzy91ZFK9hDIxToL7KVbJJZZ9ehUYhn27Hyx7CVepC4yuPH-uzaoo9PpqyRnegt2QqQNvrVYAMghe7X0n5Dc70BZ8I6yo2zYpTYy1OIo03VI6Nh9ZbHXEmIncyAUbfSOxlJRYe2Mqsw6S4W5V1EL0knNq6gjFeYnKVu2-mYTDs6IHpFfr6NH6CuI0pq4wBK-iErii-cGBs-qNIu9QhtdI2_af9s%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ef9c89bc5ca24b3fbbf2694f554e24d6&_e=lYirIdSFxnFwJ_Vh1tTisUp1JNi6s7ykdiL_-AxaJLQ93IJjEhGiO5NsuIZQfLEtVCyk7pyjK6eX1jPie1lbo0Sa_tmscnSCxFgXFyJRvMT-1mxlLztLm_Ci1pB264OPkUeaSVOaihLW491WXPG6XEskOwOLsOzjUQNfoAYAw1--aQisNUKYo_q3J5RXQORuA4PhSMqZlA06VLxGRt3GJ4r7UNX6sV4lg-IxxJW3_Z2u1HU_zqUsCJOzn5tPkt8Kv0tXMZ7Yytgt32dFQzy91SMofoLMW22nLk8s2XUQdiVG4kujgpZU6WVTtmhVyBlro768T9eyvvnkqlIUThSh1wGgudTh1mIdbdpR8MALSlY655DatO2aJXlFCNNJAMXufQQugfjTNhqTXus-vhiIM7KXxEjHrN97hX-vdFutn8qoVEH3JGVTs7bwhgAXXVxqBeDh85tTsGjjXLuuTCYd0fD8CCWVPhl9kBH8sBdvDmo%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ef9c89bc5ca24b3fbbf2694f554e24d6&_e=lYirIdSFxnFwJ_Vh1tTisUp1JNi6s7ykdiL_-AxaJLQ93IJjEhGiO5NsuIZQfLEtVCyk7pyjK6eX1jPie1lbo0Sa_tmscnSCxFgXFyJRvMT-1mxlLztLm_Ci1pB264OPkUeaSVOaihLW491WXPG6XEskOwOLsOzjUQNfoAYAw1--aQisNUKYo_q3J5RXQORuA4PhSMqZlA06VLxGRt3GJ4r7UNX6sV4lg-IxxJW3_Z2u1HU_zqUsCJOzn5tPkt8Kv0tXMZ7Yytgt32dFQzy91V8S1qsiUQmd-J4hsNzlGaxFwXfekDjb_YFB9qRfQsUnXtGRlTx0qWr8cN68ZKxSutiFhcPeN9LX_795dp7muPNAy6ALWQ5tmnmWfO_BocHuudNLPkZGbrVTpJiMgzuNXsJereNTa7Rbr8U9ck_vlMdeJSyCXlylc91DmbaRbf3iyKxu8VSdWPg5bk71EHDIS-m7As8RC1CL2X-fUmRGFlk%3D) **

At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christopher=20Ekstrom?=
subject: This Southern Senator Sucks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
He is horrible |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=32c937c243&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots delivering accountability to Congress, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=504305b13a&e=ba6e67b849)!

**Any Republican connected with attacking President Trump, and the America First movement, MUST be held accountable. That goes double in the Senate, the last bulwark against the Dems' Communism.**

Sen. Bill Cassidy (RINO-LA) is one of these worthless Leftist Republicans we must get rid of.

He made news for defending and supporting Trump-hating Liz Cheney, LAST MONTH:

_Cassidy’s declaration follows the Louisiana Republican arguing in a Sunday interview with NBC’s Meet the Press that if the GOP wants to win in 2022 and 2024, the party must agree with Cheney’s view that former President Donald Trump lost the 2020 presidential election to President Joe Biden.

“If you look at polls, there’s a whole group of folks that agree with Liz Cheney. And so, for us to win in 2022 and 2024, we need everybody. We need those who feel as Liz, those who feel as Lindsey. Ultimately it’s about the policies. You see that Cheney, Cassidy, support those policies. Those policies are a ticket to victory. Those policies bring us back in 2022,” Cassidy told host Chuck Todd._

This guy is totally clueless. He's one of the "7 Romneys" who voted to convict President Trump in the U.S. Senate. Then he goes on far-Left extremist MSNBC to bash Republicans and attack Trump- and to support Trump-hating Liz Cheney.

Seriously, this guy is a DEMOCRAT in disguise. He acts like the "LA" that comes after his name stands for Los Angeles, not Louisiana!
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=2d27cdbce9&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **This isn't the first offense for RINO Cassidy. He's always fighting for Dems:**

_Cassidy supported the appointment of people like Miguel Cardenas as Education Secretary, Linda Thomas-Greenfield as UN ambassador and Merrick Garland as Attorney General. What policies is Bill Cassidy talking about? Does he not realize personnel is policy? And should Republican voters be good with a Merrick Garland who sends the FBI to raid Rudy Giuliani’s house while refusing to accept a copy of Hunter Biden’s hard drive when Giuliani repeatedly attempts to give it to them?_

_Those policies, Bill?

Playing pet Republican to the mainstream media, which requires repeated bashings of fellow Republicans for the pleasure of the woke leftist corporate suits who run those networks, is a decent way to catch a big check at the first of the month, at least until the cable news networks and NBC Newses of the world run off so much of their audience that the cash dries up. It’s a pretty good bet that’s exactly what Liz Cheney is going to do after she gets tossed out of Congress by the voters in Wyoming in next year’s GOP primary.

But it’s an especially lousy way to win elections._

_Cassidy is no better than Romney, Cheney, Murkowski, Collins and the like. We need to start NOW to unseat these faithless RINOs. If we take a couple of scalps among them, it will scare the NEXT "Romney" back into line!_

[We need to make them respect the voters who put them there!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=93c2179d47&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=8fa315ee58&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Biden is senile and the people controlling him are Marxists! NOW is the time to fight them before they destroy the country. [Help us show them how to fight- or show them the door!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=d2f3b0d1b4&e=ba6e67b849)**

The RINOs love to tell us what we want to hear at Election time- only to break our hearts the next year. Cassidy is one of these. We won't let them get away with this! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is c](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=4a0578e006&e=ba6e67b849)[rucial to holding the Senate accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=fd336d4400&e=ba6e67b849)

The Swamp hates conservatives. They like their closed door, elite mentality. Help me bust this cartel up!

[Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f2675e14db&e=ba6e67b849)

Respectfully,
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=bbb30080c0&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Christopher Ekstrom
Businessman
America First Donor

P.S. We must defeat these RINOs! [Donate right now to help us defeat them.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=79dae9ba24&e=ba6e67b849)

Fellow American,

Is everything ok? Trump endorsed me and praised my efforts in putting America First... [**BUT I still don’t have _YOUR_ endorsement.**](https://support.murphy4congress.com/your-endorsement/?pid=6990709&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=endorsement&utm_medium=rev_sum&sc=20210623_gregmurphy_e_bh_endorsement_rev_sum&mid=%%message_id%%&sid=bh&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/greg-murphy/endorsement-r/)

Here’s where I stand:
* We must secure our southern border from the Biden crisis
* We must stop the censorship of conservatives from Big Tech monopolies
* We must end useless spending and severe inflation
* We must STOP HR1 and the Democrats’ attempts to grab control of elections away from states

[**_Again, I’ve got Trump’s ringing endorsement...but I NEED yours TODAY._**](https://support.murphy4congress.com/your-endorsement/?pid=6990709&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=endorsement&utm_medium=rev_sum&sc=20210623_gregmurphy_e_bh_endorsement_rev_sum&mid=%%message_id%%&sid=bh&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/greg-murphy/endorsement-r/)

[**ENDORSE GREG MURPHY ->**](https://support.murphy4congress.com/your-endorsement/?pid=6990709&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=endorsement&utm_medium=rev_sum&sc=20210623_gregmurphy_e_bh_endorsement_rev_sum&mid=%%message_id%%&sid=bh&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/greg-murphy/endorsement-r/)

For Freedom,

Fellow American,

They would not even allow a debate. They simply stopped the progress that started back in March, 2019 when House Democrats passed this landmark bill as the official first legislation of the 116th Congress. This is why we must send more Democrats to the U.S. Senate, and why I’m asking for your help in making that happen. Republicans have made their intentions clear: They are willing to abandon and dismantle our Democracy because they don’t want people who look like me to have access to the ballot box. Just as I’m fighting right now in Pennsylvania against far-right forces who want to question the legitimacy of our elections—the most secure elections in Pennsylvania’s history—harming voters’ confidence in our safe and secure system, I pledge to you that if elected to the U.S. Senate, I will fight with every fiber of my being to protect voting rights for ALL Americans. clean_body: The Senate is in crisis | | Friends, the Senate is in crisis. Yesterday, Senate Republicans killed the For The People Act, which would have expanded voting rights, limited the influence of money in politics, imposed new ethics laws on elected officials and curbed partisan gerrymandering. They would not even allow a debate. They simply stopped the progress that started back in March, 2019 when House Democrats passed this landmark bill as the official first legislation of the 116th Congress. This is why we must send more Democrats to the U.S. Senate, and why I’m asking for your help in making that happen. Republicans have made their intentions clear: They are willing to abandon and dismantle our Democracy because they don’t want people who look like me to have access to the ballot box. Just as I’m fighting right now in Pennsylvania against far-right forces who want to question the legitimacy of our elections—the most secure elections in Pennsylvania’s history—harming voters’ confidence in our safe and secure system, I pledge to you that if elected to the U.S. Senate, I will fight with every fiber of my being to protect voting rights for ALL Americans. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Republicans have shown us over and over again that they do not stand for Democracy. Jahana is the leader we need in Congress right now. Just take a look at all House Democrats have done over the past six months:
* _A historic recovery package in the American Rescue Plan;_
* _Preventing gun violence;_
* _Protecting women from violence;_
* _Defending our Dreamers and farmworkers;_
* _Ending discrimination against the LGBTQ community;_
* _Safeguarding our democracy._

**The list goes on from there. We have more critical work to do for our country, but we cannot do it without our majorities in Congress.**
I’m reaching out right now because CT-05 is a 50/50 split district with an almost equal number of Democratic and Republican voters. This is a close race every cycle, and as we approach the critical quarterly fundraising reporting deadline at the end of June, **it is important that Jahana is in a good position to get the message out about the work she is doing in Congress.**
[**Please donate today to support an incredible leader in Jahana Hayes. I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t important. Our Majority is ours to protect, and it is on the line.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31288133/292197167/1522229062?refcode=E9295-20210623-PelosiSurrogate-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTZlMDE5Mi03MmQ0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nyOw4nzYZw_iyFk_bknhSWO6EMXfg0lpVcKSdvyFik=)

name: Team Salud
subject: Quick update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wXVzPdker-77V_Z3p323w9pUjoOJedkoamdaSYdSyPk=/DkTgJnkfxUZvxRdf7rU_EAh5If2D9q_yuyNsslIAMd4=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
It's hard to believe that we'll be wrapping up the first half of the year soon. It seems like just yesterday we were counting down the final minutes of 2020!
Congressman Carbajal and his colleagues have had a busy year so far. In short, over the last six months they were able to:
* Pass the American Rescue Plan to provide COVID relief to millions of Americans
* Pass the For the People Act to expand voting rights and restrict the amount of money in politics
* Pass the Dream and Promise Act to give Dreamers and Temporary Protected Status (TPS) holders protections and opportunities
* Establish Juneteenth as a federal holiday to commemorate the end of slavery and celebrate Black lives and liberation

In addition, they have been working on issues like investing in our nation's infrastructure, combating climate change and addressing gun violence.
It has been a busy six months, and we are grateful to Salud for continuing to fight on our behalf. [ **_Will you join us in supporting his work by clicking here to donate to his re-election campaign?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wXVzPdker-77V_Z3p323w9pUjoOJedkoamdaSYdSyPk=/DkTgJnkfxUZvxRdf7rU_EAh5If2D9q_yuyNsslIAMd4=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
June 30 is an important deadline for our campaign. Thanks to you, we were able to report strong first quarter fundraising totals and demonstrate we are not taking anything for granted. Now, as the second quarter comes to a close, we need to keep our momentum going and do the same again.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wXVzPdker-77V_Z3p323w9pUjoOJedkoamdaSYdSyPk=/DkTgJnkfxUZvxRdf7rU_EAh5If2D9q_yuyNsslIAMd4=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
It is critical to build a strong foundation for our campaign now, and your donation will ensure we have the funds we need for campaign offices and voter outreach when the time comes.
Thank you for taking a minute to [**_chip in_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wXVzPdker-77V_Z3p323w9pUjoOJedkoamdaSYdSyPk=/DkTgJnkfxUZvxRdf7rU_EAh5If2D9q_yuyNsslIAMd4=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) what you can by June 30. Your donation means a lot to our campaign and we appreciate your support. Thank you!

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress

I need $3,217 before midnight to prove Democrats have my back and help me shut down their attacks on our sacred right to vote. Your support would mean everything to me in this critical moment. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210623_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30&amount=15]

Mitch McConnell just blocked our John Lewis Voting Rights Bill.

I can’t overstate the importance of what I’m about to ask:

Can you rush $15 right now to upend McConnell’s scheme and prove our Democrats have what it takes to hold the House and the Senate? I can’t think of a better way to make him pay than eliminating ANY chance he has to reclaim the Senate.

But it’ll take a historic surge of grassroots Democrat support to keep him out of power. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210623_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30&amount=15]

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Jailed Murderer Wins Public Office in D.C. Election with Five Inmate Candidates from Same Prison
body:
As the homicide rate hits a record high in Washington D.C. the city elects a convicted murderer to public office in a unique election featuring all inmate candidates.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | June 23, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56006&L=25190&F=H&)
---
# [Jailed Murderer Wins Public Office in D.C. Election with Five Inmate Candidates from Same Prison](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56006&L=25190&F=H&)
As the homicide rate hits a record high in Washington D.C. the city elects a convicted murderer to public office in a unique election featuring all inmate candidates. The freshly elected public official, Joel Caston, has been in prison 26 years and is currently incarcerated at the District of Columbia Jail. In 1996 Caston was convicted by a jury of first-degree murder for ambushing and killing a man in the city’s Anacostia neighborhood. Court records obtained by Judicial Watch indicate that a 2016 appeal was denied. In the document, Caston’s attorneys name the victim, which is not common practice today. Court records also reveal a “speed loader”—a device used to rapidly load ammunition into a firearm—was found by police under Caston’s mattress after the shooting. It contained six rounds of 44 caliber ammunition as well as additional rounds of ammo.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56006&L=25190&F=H&)

clean_body: As the homicide rate hits a record high in Washington D.C. the city elects a convicted murderer to public office in a unique election featuring all inmate candidates. | | | Because no one is above the law! | June 23, 2021 ---|---|--- | | As the homicide rate hits a record high in Washington D.C. the city elects a convicted murderer to public office in a unique election featuring all inmate candidates. The freshly elected public official, Joel Caston, has been in prison 26 years and is currently incarcerated at the District of Columbia Jail. In 1996 Caston was convicted by a jury of first-degree murder for ambushing and killing a man in the city’s Anacostia neighborhood. Court records obtained by Judicial Watch indicate that a 2016 appeal was denied. In the document, Caston’s attorneys name the victim, which is not common practice today. Court records also reveal a “speed loader”—a device used to rapidly load ammunition into a firearm—was found by police under Caston’s mattress after the shooting. It contained six rounds of 44 caliber ammunition as well as additional rounds of ammo. | | | == Judicial Watch Judicial Watch obtained the records after filing a May 17 Massachusetts Public Records Law request for records concerning the number of affinity spaces, the policies regarding their creation and use, the topics discussed, and any analysis of whether affinity spaces that exclude certain races are consistent with state and federal law, which would include the 14th Amendment of the U.S. Constitution, the MA Equal Rights Amendment and/or the MA School Attendance Law. == == The Epoch Times Internal emails from officials with the National Institutes of Health and an office inside the agency, the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID), show they discussed a question posed by Republican members of Congress in 2020 regarding how much the agencies sent to the Wuhan Institute of Virology. == = Fox News Schiff’s tantrum was triggered by the recent disclosure that the Trump Department of Justice obtained his phone records, along with another California Democrat, Eric Swalwell and several journalists. Their data was seized pursuant to grand jury subpoenas served on Apple in 2017 and 2018 when Schiff was the ranking Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee and Swalwell was his lackey-in-chief. = | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

We're never going to put America First with politicians who bend over backward to serve lobbyists, special interests, and the military-industrial complex.
Draining the Swamp can't be just a cheap slogan - we need leaders who are fully committed to making it a reality and making the American people their sole priority.
That's why Matt Gaetz is an indispensable member of Congress. name: John Fetterman
subject: It's the filibuster or our democracy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
At any point, I'd readily trade my career for important, once-in-a-generation legislation to heal and transform our nation.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210623-1822-header&t=1&akid=1822%2E434096%2EuOWJN_)
I wanted to send you a short note after yesterday's deeply disappointing vote in the Senate.
Peter, the For the People Act didn't have to stall the way it did.
Democrats *literally* have a way around Mitch McConnell on this. But it will take every Democratic senator having the courage to do the right thing by abolishing the filibuster. _It will take all 50 Democratic senators voting like actual Democrats._
**At any point, I'd readily trade my career for important, once-in-a-generation legislation to heal and transform our nation.**
Just imagine if your vote was the margin of difference to secure the most transformative legislation to reform our democracy in decades.
That, in and of itself, would cap a career of public service.
**If elected to the Senate, it is my promise to you that I would ALWAYS be that deciding vote that Democrats need to deliver for working people.** But I'll need your help to get there in a race as crowded and ultra-competitive as this one. **[ _If you can, please send your first $5 our way ahead of next week's Q2 deadline to support this fight to flip this seat for working people._](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21105?refcode=em20210623-1822&t=2&akid=1822%2E434096%2EuOWJN_)**__
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21105?refcode=em20210623-1822&t=21&akid=1822%2E434096%2EuOWJN_)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you. I am truly, truly grateful for all the support you've given our campaign so far.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. Below is an exclusive live look at the Jim Crow filibuster "protecting our democracy." 🙄 It's standing in the way of real progress for millions of working people — **so let's ditch it.[_Please donate $5 if you're alongside me in this fight._](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21105?refcode=em20210623-1822&t=22&akid=1822%2E434096%2EuOWJN_)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21105?refcode=em20210623-1822&t=23&akid=1822%2E434096%2EuOWJN_)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210623-1822-footer&t=24&refcode2=1822_434096_uOWJN_&akid=1822%2E434096%2EuOWJN_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

subject: John Cox: Newsom Fiddles While California Burns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc
body:
John Cox Blasts Newsom for Lying About California’s Wildfire Prevention Efforts | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/votejohncox/john-cox-newsom-fiddles-while-california-burns-political?e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=577ad84387&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
June 23, 2021

---
| **CONTACT**
Anthony Ramirez
[anthony@votejohncox.com](mailto:anthony@votejohncox.com)
---
### Newsom Fiddles While California Burns
_John Cox Blasts Newsom for Lying About California’s Wildfire Prevention Efforts_
SAN DIEGO, CALIFORNIA—Gubernatorial Candidate John Cox blasted pretty boy Gavin Newsom today following [reports](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=77bc72fb6d&e=b8a6795190) that he lied to the public on California’s wildfire prevention efforts.“Gavin Newsom fiddles while California burns,” Cox declared. “Turns out the pretty boy governor has been playing politics instead of solving problems. Newsom promised transformational attention to wildfire prevention; instead, the only thing transformed has been California’s landscape as a result of record fires. It has got to stop. Newsom must be recalled.”CapRadio and NPR’s California Newsroom have uncovered shocking information about Newsom scaling back wildfire prevention while saying it was being boosted. Now California is facing its worst fire season in history. Their full report can be read [here](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=abdb1299e1&e=b8a6795190).“It’s too little, too late,” Cox concluded. “Gavin Newsom has lied to California. I’ll implement real change to address wildfires and all the issues facing our state.”
# # #
|
---
TV Stations interested in talking to John Cox via Zoom can reach out to the campaign by contacting Press Secretary Anthony Ramirez at [anthony@votejohncox.com](mailto:anthony@votejohncox.com).
| | | **ABOUT** John Cox is a political outsider who’ll shake up Sacramento and cut taxes. California is spiraling downward as it’s been failed by career politicians and insiders who look out for their own interests, and not those of the average Californian. John’s an outsider, who doesn’t owe the establishment anything. He understands what it’s like to scratch and claw to survive and succeed.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Filibustered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The GOP.
#
Peter,
The way forward is _WITHOUT_ the filibuster.
For our democracy, we must protect every person’s right to vote. But Republicans blocked historic voting rights legislation (the For The People Act) by using the filibuster. Republican voter suppression laws in states across the country threaten free and fair elections in 2022, 2024, and every year beyond.
For our democracy, we must have a commission to fully investigate the deadly January 6 attack on the Capitol. And we must hold all those responsible accountable — especially GOP insurrectionists like Donald Trump and Ted Cruz. But Republicans blocked the creation of a January 6 commission by using the filibuster.
**It couldn’t be more clear: it’s the filibuster or our democracy.** We must respond by getting rid of the filibuster to protect voting rights, preserve our democracy, and take power away from Mitch McConnell in the Senate.
[**If you agree, join me in this fight with an urgent donation of $3 or more right now. Democracy is on the line. We can win but I need your grassroots support to fight back.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210623?refcode=em20210623-401&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=401_420207_CnyFpj&akid=401%2E420207%2ECnyFpj)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210623?refcode=em20210623-401&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=401_420207_CnyFpj&akid=401%2E420207%2ECnyFpj)**
Republicans will always prioritize voter suppression and protecting people like Trump and Cruz who fuel attacks on our country. And with the filibuster in place, our Democratic majority won’t be able to pass the critical reforms needed at this moment — like getting big money out of politics, LGBTQIA+ protections, gun violence prevention measures, climate justice, and more. It’s clear: we must nix the filibuster and deliver for the people.
[**If we don’t, our democracy will only face greater threats and Republicans will get away with all of this. We can’t let them. Chip in $3 right now to help fuel my fight to end the filibuster and deliver for the people >>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210623?refcode=em20210623-401&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=401_420207_CnyFpj&akid=401%2E420207%2ECnyFpj)
In solidarity,
Pramila

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I’m putting Republicans on Notice
body:
Right now, six bills are being debated in Congress that supposedly take on Big Tech.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wEbSDqvbwuew7p9Se5HnOw/NGsXxA2emkVxhg0jwDLOXA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wEbSDqvbwuew7p9Se5HnOw/NGsXxA2emkVxhg0jwDLOXA) Right now, six bills are being debated in Congress that supposedly take on Big Tech.

Sounds good right?

Nope.

The proposed antitrust legislation does NOTHING to end discriminatory practices against Americans. The bills don’t protect our privacy (they actually make it worse), and they sure as hell don’t protect our Freedom of Speech.

These are what you call “paper tiger bills.”

This is why I need your help to win my race for Congress. There’s just seven days left until the end of the quarter, [**so please donate now**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wEbSDqvbwuew7p9Se5HnOw/NGsXxA2emkVxhg0jwDLOXA).

So what do these bills do?

Politicians, under the guise of bipartisan support, are selling the bills as preventing a tech monopoly.

**The American people won’t benefit from these bills AT ALL . . . but India and China will.**

And that’s a story for another day.

As Democrats move forward with their “America Last” agenda, Republicans in Congress continue to put their heads in the sand over the true harm being done by Big Tech each and every day. But here’s why I’m putting them on notice . . . **Republican leadership is doing NOTHING to stop the Big Tech takeover of our elections!**

Mark Zuckerberg personally donated $400 million to influence the elections in 2020.

**And this year, all of the Big Tech Titans are coming together under a single banner called the “Chamber of Progress” to lock in the results of our elections for decades to come . . . starting in 2022.**

[**Help me get to Congress and stop them.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wEbSDqvbwuew7p9Se5HnOw/NGsXxA2emkVxhg0jwDLOXA)
If Republican leadership and Republicans in safe, red seats don’t step up to protect the most sacred right we have under our Republic – our vote – **they need to either switch parties or retire because they’re a disgrace**.

**Election integrity and Big Tech Election Interference should be the #1 issue for every Republican going into the next election cycle.**

Without free and fair elections, no other issues matter, including law & order, immigration and rebuilding our economy.

We know Democrats aren’t going to lift a finger to prevent Mark Zuckerberg and his buddies from taking over our elections – because they’ll win!

Our LAST LINE OF DEFENSE at the federal level are the 211 Republicans in Congress.

All 211 of them have an obligation to make this their top issue – especially those sitting safely in Red districts.

And if they don’t . . . **they can expect a primary challenger who will do their job for them**.

[**Help me get to Congress today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wEbSDqvbwuew7p9Se5HnOw/NGsXxA2emkVxhg0jwDLOXA)

clean_body: Right now, six bills are being debated in Congress that supposedly take on Big Tech. | | | Patriot, Right now, six bills are being debated in Congress that supposedly take on Big Tech. Sounds good right? Nope. The proposed antitrust legislation does NOTHING to end discriminatory practices against Americans. The bills don’t protect our privacy (they actually make it worse), and they sure as hell don’t protect our Freedom of Speech. These are what you call “paper tiger bills.” This is why I need your help to win my race for Congress. There’s just seven days left until the end of the quarter, . So what do these bills do? Politicians, under the guise of bipartisan support, are selling the bills as preventing a tech monopoly. The American people won’t benefit from these bills AT ALL . . . but India and China will. And that’s a story for another day. As Democrats move forward with their “America Last” agenda, Republicans in Congress continue to put their heads in the sand over the true harm being done by Big Tech each and every day. But here’s why I’m putting them on notice . . . Republican leadership is doing NOTHING to stop the Big Tech takeover of our elections! Mark Zuckerberg personally donated $400 million to influence the elections in 2020. And this year, all of the Big Tech Titans are coming together under a single banner called the “Chamber of Progress” to lock in the results of our elections for decades to come . . . starting in 2022. If Republican leadership and Republicans in safe, red seats don’t step up to protect the most sacred right we have under our Republic – our vote – they need to either switch parties or retire because they’re a disgrace. Election integrity and Big Tech Election Interference should be the #1 issue for every Republican going into the next election cycle. Without free and fair elections, no other issues matter, including law & order, immigration and rebuilding our economy. We know Democrats aren’t going to lift a finger to prevent Mark Zuckerberg and his buddies from taking over our elections – because they’ll win! Our LAST LINE OF DEFENSE at the federal level are the 211 Republicans in Congress. All 211 of them have an obligation to make this their top issue – especially those sitting safely in Red districts. And if they don’t . . . they can expect a primary challenger who will do their job for them. The end of quarter is coming up in seven days and we’re falling behind on our fundraising goal. Thanks again for all that you do. name: Wendy Rogers
subject: AZ audit urgent updates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE
body:
Biden trying to shut us down |
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57793679:J3gZHdlN2:m:1:3253819041:9D2CE0F4C38D5C3B7998DC0327F119BF:r)
---
| Hi Peter,

Now many states are coming to observe us- so of course, Biden's terrified Justice Department is trying to shut us down!

I am Senator Wendy Rogers, the Arizona State Senator who was the pivotal vote for the audit. **[Can you help me stand up for America's Audit?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57793679:J3gZHdlN2:m:1:3253819041:9D2CE0F4C38D5C3B7998DC0327F119BF:r)**

A few key updates:

\- **We are almost finished with counting the ballots.**
\- Paper examination has accelerated.
\- One day this week, an incredible 90,000 ballots were counted by 21 tables.
\- As of 11 June, delegations will have visited; from GA, NV, PA, VA, AK, CO, WA, MI.

And a few more lessons:

\- Voter roll software nationwide is highly vulnerable.
\- Voter rolls should be tied to driver's licenses.
\- For example, Medicare knows when someone dies; similarly, voter rolls should be cleaned up.
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57793679:J3gZHdlN2:m:1:3253819041:9D2CE0F4C38D5C3B7998DC0327F119BF:r)
---
| _**Now the bad news: Biden's Attorney General, Merrick Garland, has made it clear he will inject himself, against the Constitution and against multiple court decisions, to try to stop the AZ Audit.**_

_In a shocking video, Attorney General Merrick Garland announced that the Justice Department will look with scrutiny into any post-election audits concerning evidence of voting law violations. This has many worried over what federal interference in state-led audits could lead the presence of states ' rights to in the future.

U.S. House Rep Adam Schiff (D-CA) wanted to "clean house" at the Department of Justice, putting Attorney General Merrick Garland on the hot seat. **Not long after, Garland gave a speech where he was critical of new election reform laws that were put into place in states led by Republicans.**

Criticizing some post-election audits, Garland said they have relied on "assertions of material vote fraud in the 2020 election that have been refuted by law enforcement and intelligence agencies." Garland also announced the Justice Department's Civil Rights Division will double the number of enforcement staff who are supposedly dedicated to protecting the right to vote in the next 30 days.

In his speech, Garland claimed that the DOJ will "do everything in its power to prevent election fraud, and if found to vigorously prosecute" but will also scrutinize "new laws that seek to curb voter access." _Garland urged Congress "to pass S-1 and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, which would provide the department with the tools it needs."__
---

| To Merrick Garland I warn:

You will not touch Arizona ballots or machines unless you want to spend time in an Arizona prison.

Maybe you should focus on stopping terrorism. The Justice Department is one of the most corrupt institutions in the USA- and losing confidence more every day.

_**Merrick Garland's politically motivated crusade against election integrity has already been defeated by the courts. It cannot stand. **_

The Constitution grants the states sole authority over the conduct and scrutiny over elections. Merrick Garland has ZERO statutory or constitutional basis to threaten America's Audit. He knows it- but the insane Democrats like Adam Schiff in DC are pushing him.

**Any Republican who voted to confirm this guy needs to be primaried.**
---
|
---
| Several states had issues with the 2020 elections. The citizens of those states deserve to have their questions answered.

To not do so is voter suppression- Merrick Garland and Joe Biden basically told people their votes don't count. _He thinks people should just trust the politically motivated FBI._

The Left and their media sycophants can't repeat their mantra of "there is no fraud" anymore. **We have proof. Hard proof. And we are learning just how to close these election law loopholes.**

I am the key vote that allowed the audit to proceed. [That's why I need to ask for your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57793679:J3gZHdlN2:m:1:3253819041:9D2CE0F4C38D5C3B7998DC0327F119BF:r)

**Arizona's audit is clearly the blueprint for election integrity efforts throughout the country. Many states have come to see for themselves!**

_This audit is showing legislators which election loopholes we need to close through legislation. _[Stand with me so we can finish the job!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57793679:J3gZHdlN2:m:1:3253819041:9D2CE0F4C38D5C3B7998DC0327F119BF:r)

_As you can see, I am telling the REAL story of how the audit is going. The press never will. Biden never will. So I need your help!_

[Help me fight for the truth!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57793679:J3gZHdlN2:m:1:3253819041:9D2CE0F4C38D5C3B7998DC0327F119BF:r) \- Help me keep my seat so we can see this process through, together!

Thank you and God bless you.

clean_body: Biden trying to shut us down | | | | Hi Peter, Now many states are coming to observe us- so of course, Biden's terrified Justice Department is trying to shut us down! I am Senator Wendy Rogers, the Arizona State Senator who was the pivotal vote for the audit. A few key updates: \- We are almost finished with counting the ballots. \- Paper examination has accelerated. \- One day this week, an incredible 90,000 ballots were counted by 21 tables. \- As of 11 June, delegations will have visited; from GA, NV, PA, VA, AK, CO, WA, MI. And a few more lessons: \- Voter roll software nationwide is highly vulnerable. \- Voter rolls should be tied to driver's licenses. \- For example, Medicare knows when someone dies; similarly, voter rolls should be cleaned up. | | Now the bad news: Biden's Attorney General, Merrick Garland, has made it clear he will inject himself, against the Constitution and against multiple court decisions, to try to stop the AZ Audit. This has many worried over what federal interference in state-led audits could lead the presence of states ' rights to in the future. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: One week from today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We want to talk about why June 30 is an important date for our campaign.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210623-2233-header&t=1&akid=2233%2E2526796%2E7EAw9E)
We want to talk about why June 30 is an important date for our campaign.
After June 30 — one week from today — our campaign will submit a public report to the FEC detailing how much we’ve fundraised in the last three months.
As one of the most heavily targeted members of Congress, Alexandria’s report will draw huge attention from political opponents, pundits, and powerful special interests who are hoping to see our movement lose momentum.
**That’s why we’ve set a goal to hit 106,617 grassroots contributions by the end of this quarter.** The amount of contributions we receive — no matter the amount — will help show that Alexandria and our unapologetic fight for systemic change has strong support — from your city and across the country.
So far we’ve received 85,031 contributions toward our goal. **So, we need your help right now to close that gap and get us to our goal before midnight on June 30th.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210623-2?refcode=em20210623-2233-P&t=2&refcode2=2233_2526796_7EAw9E&akid=2233%2E2526796%2E7EAw9E)
[Can you make a $3 contribution right now to show your support for Alexandria on this report and help our campaign hit this critical fundraising goal before the deadline on June 30?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210623-2?refcode=em20210623-2233-P&t=22&refcode2=2233_2526796_7EAw9E&akid=2233%2E2526796%2E7EAw9E)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210623-2?refcode=em20210623-2233-P&t=23&refcode2=2233_2526796_7EAw9E&akid=2233%2E2526796%2E7EAw9E)**
Our movement has always been driven by the dedication of individual, small-dollar donors like you giving an average of just under $20. We’re proud of that fact.
Because when hundreds of thousands of people chip in $5, $10, and $20 at a time, it all adds up to compete against the billionaires and corporations who use their money to rig the political system in their favor.
But, candidly, our fundraising has slowed down since hitting the summer months this year, and we need your support to keep Alexandria in Congress fighting for bold solutions for working families.
[Can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can right now to help post the strongest FEC report possible and power our movement forward?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210623-2?refcode=em20210623-2233-P&t=24&refcode2=2233_2526796_7EAw9E&akid=2233%2E2526796%2E7EAw9E)
This work wouldn’t be possible without you.
Thank you for being on our team,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210623-2?refcode=em20210623-2233-P&t=25&refcode2=2233_2526796_7EAw9E&akid=2233%2E2526796%2E7EAw9E)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2233%2E2526796%2E7EAw9E) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2233%2E2526796%2E7EAw9E) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2233%2E2526796%2E7EAw9E)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=2233%2E2526796%2E7EAw9E)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=2233%2E2526796%2E7EAw9E)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: It starts today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Winning starts now. |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0f957db3f6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative and a patriot leading the charge to hold Maricopa County elections supervisors accountable! I am on mission to restore election integrity in Arizona with real solutions not happy talk.

**While I am backed by one of the largest grassroots movement in a generation, it is absolutely critical that I am elected to Secretary of State where I will oversee the state’s elections and ensure that the travesty of the 2020 election never happens again!**

_But this all starts with you. And it starts TODAY._

We are up against an URGENT fundraising deadline by the end of the month where we have to reach our fundraising goal of $50,000.

**I need you to understand that if we do not reach our goal, it is not just THIS election, but ALL elections that are at stake.**
**_It is integrity on the ballot and it is the soul of America on the line._**

Will we become a FAKE Democracy like Russia where the Democrats just elect themselves into power every year while claiming freedom?

**Or will we actually fight back, make a stand, and not let the Democrats have their way with American Democracy?**

[_Donate TODAY to turn this country around. Let’s get back on track and save our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=324077e590&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ac811c7335&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Well, here you go.**

**CNN is blasting the Audit now.**

You know me. And you know my question has been the same.

_If there was nothing to hide in the 2020 election in Arizona, what are you afraid of?_

**_You should be celebrating the audit to vindicate your “success!”_**

But we all know that that’s not true.

_That’s just not how reality works._

In reality, you are hiding because you are scared.

**But here’s the thing. The Left, right now, has shown they control our elections, the media, and the big corporations.**
**_And if you don’t donate TODAY, the REALITY doesn’t matter. What matters is the control the Democrats will have wrested out of our hands._**

Will you let them do that?

[_Donate TODAY to help us reach our urgent fundraising goal of $50,000 to continue to fight for America’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3d3188fe39&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ee84c2c542&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| While there has been a torrent of hate and venom sent my way, [I have stood up for this grassroots movement.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2070c50042&e=44b8c466b0)

**It is personal to me.**

**While others remained silent, and even declined the invitation to sit on the hearing panel after November 3rd, I stood up to be the voice of the voters. There would not have been a full-day Public Hearing on Election Integrity if I had not stood up to the establishment leaders in Arizona.**

_The establishment wanted to bury the fraud, incompetence, and mismanagement of the 2020 Presidential election in Arizona, but I said NOT ON MY WATCH! I was denied the use of the House of Representative hearing rooms, but we found another venue._

**This was so important that I fronted the cost myself. I am glad that a select group of legislators had the courage to join me and pursue the truth knowing they would face ridicule and harassment. We listened to our constituents when others blew them off.**

**_So do you want a Secretary of State that listens to constituents, gives them a voice in the process, and takes action or one who was part of the problem?_**

You have seen the attacks against me and you have seen what I have done.

**If I can do all of this as a representative in the Arizona House, imagine what I could do as Secretary of State?**

_My heart is on the table. I have bled for Election Integrity, and [I will continue the fight no matter what!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=162cf1cda4&e=44b8c466b0)_

For our children, for our grandchildren.

**To all the Democrats who want to steal our Freedoms away from us, I have one thing to say.**

**_Not on my watch._**

[_Donate as much as you can to save our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9069ee7ff1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [_Are you in?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=59b1ba8767&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f82cd041fe&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f678a2633c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=5350c7dcab) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=5350c7dcab).

name: Erica Smith
subject: There is absolutely no defense for the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I will vote to abolish the Jim Crow filibuster once and for all.
#
Yesterday, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans used the filibuster to block the For The People Act, a historic and urgently needed measure to protect and expand voting rights.
**There is absolutely NO defense for the Jim Crow filibuster.** The filibuster is a Jim Crow relic and a tool for white supremacy — and Senate Republicans will continue to use it to block the bold, progressive changes that young people, working folks, and Black and brown communities demand.
We need Democrats in the Senate who will fearlessly advocate for transformative change, and have the political will to do what’s right for our democracy.
**That’s why when I’m in the U.S. Senate, I will vote to abolish the filibuster once and for all. But I’ll need a lot of support from folks in your state and across the country to get there.**
**So I'm humbly asking:[Will you chip in $5 or more today so we can flip North Carolina’s Republican-held, open Senate seat, abolish the filibuster, and deliver real results for our communities?](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3054?refcode=em20210623-201&t=1&akid=201%2E3698%2E6h2lQ7)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3054?refcode=em20210623-201&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=201%2E3698%2E6h2lQ7)**
Thank you for your support today and every day,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210623-201-footer&t=21&refcode2=201_3698_6h2lQ7&akid=201%2E3698%2E6h2lQ7)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=22&akid=201%2E3698%2E6h2lQ7)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=201%2E3698%2E6h2lQ7)

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: Voicemail from Marco's iPhone 📩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I just got out of a meeting and saw that Marco Rubio left me a voicemail...
|
---
| | | Peter -- I just got out of a meeting and saw that Marco Rubio left me a voicemail. _" Hey Ron, it's Marco -- I need your help. Ever since Val Demings entered the Senate race in Florida, Democrats from across the country have been flooding her campaign with cash so that she can transform Florida into the next Democrat stronghold. This is the same Pelosi Puppet that applauded the riots and that led the impeachment circus against President Trump. I have a deadline approaching, and I need your help to reach it so we can protect our state from the Left's dangerous agenda. I'm $12K short. Give me a call back and let me know if you can help. I really appreciate it." _
This is serious, Peter. The stakes don't get higher than this and Marco needs our help.
---
| | [HELP MARCO REACH HIS GOAL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57794143:JJh_hdlNW:m:1:3253819041:4F14B41854DA47675C114A0B88ED54CF:r "HELP MARCO REACH HIS GOAL")
---

I am going to give Marco a call back at 6:00 AM tomorrow, and I want to tell him that America's strongest conservative supporters have already raised $12K to help FIGHT BACK against his Pelosi Puppet opponent. **[Can you donate before midnight tonight to help him reach his goal?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57794143:JJh_hdlNW:m:1:3253819041:4F14B41854DA47675C114A0B88ED54CF:r "Can you donate before midnight tonight to help him reach his goal?")**

---

---

This is the FIRST deadline since getting an opponent for Marco, and if he fails, it will be a nightmare, Peter.

If there was ever a time to show your support for Marco and America, right now is your chance.

**[I need you to step up. Please don't let me down.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57794143:JJh_hdlNW:m:1:3253819041:4F14B41854DA47675C114A0B88ED54CF:r "I need you to step up. Please don't let me down.")**

Thank you for putting Florida and America First,
Ron DeSantis

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Florida is crushing it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Follow us |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=282fd10a74&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I'm thrilled with the job that Gov. DeSantis is doing here in Florida. He has defended our freedoms, opened our economy, fought Big Tech, and fought Biden.

His last election was close. But the next one won't be. Gov. DeSantis will BLOW OUT THE DEMS because he's proving that America First policies work- and they are popular!

It's time the Republicans in Congress followed suit.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8e067122be&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, a Pelosi sycophant. I nearly beat him last year, and I will win it this year!**

I'm tired of leftist Swampy Republicans like Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger trying to tell us that actual conservative, America First policies lose elections.

That's poppycock.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=de39b51576&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**By 2020, Ron DeSantis had been governing with America First policies for two years. He kept Florida open and did not impose a mask mandate.**__

**Our economy flourished. People moved here, including President Trump. And we were shining brightly when Blue states like New York and California were taking away people's rights- and failing to control COVID.**

So now, with Florida being the success story of the nation, in 2020 we got REDDER compared to 2016 and 2018. We flipped several House seats (I almost won my own too) and Trump carried the state handily.

In fact, if every state in the Union moved to the right the way Florida did, Trump would have won with 320 electoral votes!

Now, why does this matter? Because it shows that America First policies work, and they are popular. They are popular among Hispanics, among Black voters, among everyone.

And our policies produce results that are hard to beat.

Now if only the Swampy Republicans realized this. BPR notes that many have not.

_Republican Sen. Mitt Romney of Utah on Monday predicted that removing Rep. Liz Cheney from her leadership position as the House Republican Conference chair will cost the party voters and lead to election losses in the 2022 midterms and the 2024 general elections.

“Expelling Liz Cheney from leadership won’t gain the GOP one additional voter, but it will cost us quite a few,” Romney posted on Twitter.

Romney’s comments in support of Cheney come ahead of a vote on Wednesday by the GOP caucus in which she is expected to be ousted from her post after surviving a similar showdown in February. Republican leaders have become increasingly disenchanted with Cheney over her pushback on the party’s strategy to focus on working-class voters under an ‘America First’ platform championed by former President Donald Trump._

Mitt Romney ran for President twice and lost both. Why would we listen to him instead of Trump?

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda, just like Gov. DeSantis is doing in Florida. I will bring Florida's success to Capitol Hill!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. _I am the guy he's scared of, he wants NO part of seeing me again because our district is trending Red- like our state!_

We need congressmen who will FIGHT the Dems, not vote like them. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ff171af4d8&e=afa21b7626)

The Dems must go! [Help me make America like Florida!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=616119fb64&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ba416bcb19&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=34bf56dbd7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. clean_body: Follow us | | | | Hi Peter, I'm thrilled with the job that Gov. DeSantis is doing here in Florida. He has defended our freedoms, opened our economy, fought Big Tech, and fought Biden. His last election was close. But the next one won't be. Gov. DeSantis will BLOW OUT THE DEMS because he's proving that America First policies work- and they are popular! It's time the Republicans in Congress followed suit. My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet , Florida’s 9th District. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, a Pelosi sycophant. I nearly beat him last year, and I will win it this year! I'm tired of leftist Swampy Republicans like Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger trying to tell us that actual conservative, America First policies lose elections. That's poppycock. | | By 2020, Ron DeSantis had been governing with America First policies for two years. He kept Florida open and did not impose a mask mandate. Our economy flourished. People moved here, including President Trump. And we were shining brightly when Blue states like New York and California were taking away people's rights- and failing to control COVID. So now, with Florida being the success story of the nation, in 2020 we got REDDER compared to 2016 and 2018. We flipped several House seats (I almost won my own too) and Trump carried the state handily. In fact, if every state in the Union moved to the right the way Florida did, Trump would have won with 320 electoral votes! Now, why does this matter? Because it shows that America First policies work, and they are popular. They are popular among Hispanics, among Black voters, among everyone. And our policies produce results that are hard to beat. Now if only the Swampy Republicans realized this. BPR notes that many have not. Republican Sen. Mitt Romney of Utah on Monday predicted that removing Rep. Liz Cheney from her leadership position as the House Republican Conference chair will cost the party voters and lead to election losses in the 2022 midterms and the 2024 general elections. “Expelling Liz Cheney from leadership won’t gain the GOP one additional voter, but it will cost us quite a few,” Romney posted on Twitter. Romney’s comments in support of Cheney come ahead of a vote on Wednesday by the GOP caucus in which she is expected to be ousted from her post after surviving a similar showdown in February. Republican leaders have become increasingly disenchanted with Cheney over her pushback on the party’s strategy to focus on working-class voters under an ‘America First’ platform championed by former President Donald Trump. Mitt Romney ran for President twice and lost both. Why would we listen to him instead of Trump? Help me get to Congress, and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda, just like Gov. DeSantis is doing in Florida. I will bring Florida's success to Capitol Hill! I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. I am the guy he's scared of, he wants NO part of seeing me again because our district is trending Red- like our state! We need congressmen who will FIGHT the Dems, not vote like them. The Dems must go! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - ! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. | | PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Peter, Thanks to Joe Biden, President Trump’s America First agenda is UNDER ATTACK. Joe Biden’s first order of business after he was sworn in? Undo ALL of the progress our great nation made under President Trump. The consequences have been DIRE:
* Higher unemployment
* A national security crisis at our southern border

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Washington state and Utah have this in common
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
The fact is, our democracy is stronger when more people vote.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/erqjJVy6p9hY/UDFGQVJlN1BoT2NRbzNKOWZCclpWUkYraE1tQ2p6R2ZHaTJvTDZDVkdLSUFiY25NTGFxcC9LMWxMM1RMMGFyRmo3WllKTGJJL0xNUk5QYVd6bjFPeHcyZlU1VjZva2sycU42eW1lTUZTVEU9S0/MmEyT3RVMCtma3FLbWVDWEJqR0ppeWo1bDk4OXFEamxLM3c1WHBOdHlSST0S1) Friend, When Donald Trump lost the 2020 election, he didn't graciously accept the outcome as Democratic and Republican contenders have for hundreds of years. Instead, he launched what's come to be known as the Big Lie -- the false notion that the 2020 election was "stolen" from him because of rampant voter fraud through mail-in ballots. How much evidence is there to support this claim? Zero. But since then, Trump's Republican foot soldiers in state legislatures across the country have been using the Big Lie as cover for passing restrictive voting laws that make it harder for people, and especially people of color, to vote. **[I won't stand for it, and I know you won't either. Take one moment right now to send a message with me: These Republican attacks on our democracy are an absolute disgrace, and we should be making it _easier_ for people to vote -- not harder. ](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/RaxXsV4d_vhK/UDFGQVJlN1BoT2NRbzNKOWZCclpWUkYraE1tQ2p6R2ZHaTJvTDZDVkdLSUFiY25NTGFxcC9LMWxMM1RMMGFyRmo3WllKTGJJL0xNUk5QYVd6bjFPeHcyZlU1VjZva2sycU42eW1lTUZTVEU9S0/MmEyT3RVMCtma3FLbWVDWEJqR0ppeWo1bDk4OXFEamxLM3c1WHBOdHlSST0S1)** Our democracy is stronger when more people vote -- and I'm proud that our state had one of the highest turnout rates in the nation last year (75%). That's in part because we make it easy. You'll never see a line out the door to vote here. No one waits in the rain, the cold, or the heat to fill out a ballot. We mail a ballot to every voter, and we even cover the postage so they can mail it back free of charge. And let's be clear: Making it easier for people to vote isn't just for blue states. Our friends down in the red state of Utah have made it incredibly easy for citizens there to vote, too. But in some states -- Georgia, Texas, and Arizona, to name a few -- Republicans are pulling out all the stops to prevent more people from voting. Any day now, the Supreme Court is going to rule on _Brnovich v. Democratic National Committee_ , a crucial voting rights case that will decide the constitutionality of Arizona's new voting law, which makes it a felony -- _a felony!_ \-- for anyone other than a family member, a caregiver, or a postal worker to drop off someone's mail ballot. If it is ruled constitutional, the consequences will reverberate throughout the nation. **[Let's raise our voices right now to say that no matter where you live, voting should be just as easy as it is in Washington state. Add your name if you agree!](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/RaxXsV4d_vhK/UDFGQVJlN1BoT2NRbzNKOWZCclpWUkYraE1tQ2p6R2ZHaTJvTDZDVkdLSUFiY25NTGFxcC9LMWxMM1RMMGFyRmo3WllKTGJJL0xNUk5QYVd6bjFPeHcyZlU1VjZva2sycU42eW1lTUZTVEU9S0/MmEyT3RVMCtma3FLbWVDWEJqR0ppeWo1bDk4OXFEamxLM3c1WHBOdHlSST0S1)** Very truly yours, Jay | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/XXv0hXdPvVsN/UDFGQVJlN1BoT2NRbzNKOWZCclpWUkYraE1tQ2p6R2ZHaTJvTDZDVkdLSUFiY25NTGFxcC9LMWxMM1RMMGFyRmo3WllKTGJJL0xNUk5QYVd6bjFPeHcyZlU1VjZva2sycU42eW1lTUZTVEU9S0/MmEyT3RVMCtma3FLbWVDWEJqR0ppeWo1bDk4OXFEamxLM3c1WHBOdHlSST0S1)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=18904611&r=NjM1MTU5NDU3MzQ5S0&j=MjE0NDgzODkwMwS2&l=11521023&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
